sequence: 一叶孤舟，孤悬于海面之上
风暴何时停息，孤舟何时倾覆？
光明在何方，希望又在何方？
吾如梦中之蝶，飞舞于虚幻之间
愿光明划破阴云，愿希望指引重樱

玉响.say: 天岩岛内城·拂晓
哐啷啷
啊！龙凤大人快闪开！！
驱逐舰响正抱着巨大的神台打算从楼梯上下来，却一脚踏空失去了平衡。
哐啷！
随着巨大的翻滚声，响完美地躺在了庭院的草地上，仰望着拂晓的晨光。
唔…痛痛痛~
龙凤大人真过分，居然真的对我见死不救！！
玄关旁，身着锦衣的少女完美地避开了从楼梯上意外滚落的驱逐舰，并轻盈地接住了飞来的神台。
驱逐舰摔在草地上可不会断成两截，而这个神台会。
啊，龙凤大人真是的~
还有两天就是祭典了，不谨慎点处理可是会坏了大事的。
这次祭典，她们真的还会来吗？
放心，两方的大人都是明事理的人。就算平时再怎么闹别扭，也不会缺席重樱的重要祭典的。
特别是在现在这样的困境时刻。这次天宇启户祭也许会是重新寻觅正确方向的契机吧……
龙凤，原来你在这里啊。
是能代啊，这么急着找我有什么事么？
刚刚收到了铁血使团发来的电报，她们应赤城大人的邀请前来参加祭典，预计会在本日上午抵达。
我明白了，吩咐沿途关卡予以放行。这是第一次有海外使团参与的祭典，非同往常啊……
来者是客。能代，接待使团的工作能交给你负责吗？
好的，我收拾一下就出发。
龙凤，演武环节的准备就拜托你了。帮我选个好次序哦~
来自重樱各处的大人与海外高手齐聚一堂，甚至不乏久经沙场的前辈！真期待与她们的交手环节…
哈哈哈，那当然，演武也是祭典的一部分，本次祭典各方面都不马虎哦！
敲门声
失礼了。龙凤，赤城大人以及随行舰队即将抵达天岩岛。
啊！一航战的大人们果然来了！
看来首先是你的回合呢，龙凤。
……终于要正式开始了！
诸位，本次天宇启户祭，将会是决定重樱未来的重要祭典。
我们不但是主祭信浓大人的代行者，更是祭典中不可或缺的一部分。
祭典即将开始，各位请进入自己的角色。
明白！
那么，我们就出发了，信浓大人
龙凤走出庭院时，回头望了一眼天守阁，鞠了一躬。

木偶.say: 天岩岛近海·日出
天岩岛，由主岛和六个与主岛相连的小岛构成
如同光芒万丈的太阳，又如同寒冷圣洁的冰晶
这里是重樱本岛之外的离岛，是集合了重樱祈愿与信仰的圣地，也是信浓居住的圣所。
天岩岛…信浓的居城还真是选了个好地方啊…
圣地，圣所…从“决战计划”开始后，信仰之力都流到这些地方么。
尽是大费周折做些没用的事…
赤城，你不看好“决战计划”的战斗能力么？
呵呵呵，怎么可能。如果“决战计划”不能发挥出应有作用的话，我也是会很困扰的哦。
不过…消耗了宝贵的信仰，甚至动用了珍贵神器才创造出的巨大航母，现在却只懂得睡觉……
据说信浓大人就算在睡梦中也能洞悉世间的一切变化，而且还能托梦给祭祀下达指令哟？是真是假就不知道了…
哼，这种鬼扯的胡话最多也就只能骗骗那些没见过世面的小姑娘了吧。
这次祭典真的能取得传说中记载的，帮助重樱“扫清黑暗，迎接光明”的效果么？
山城，你在这方面是专业的，说说你的看法？
是…是！
按照记载，每隔数年的血月盈满之时，在此供奉着的宝器——神石【海若】的封印就会解除。
通过天宇启户祭，主祭将收集来的信仰作为祭品、【海若】作为触媒，向海神诚心祈祷就可以创造出只记录于传说之中的「舰船」。
骏河的建造过程似乎就与此有关哦…
顺带一提，天宇启户祭的主祭历来都是时任重樱的“巫女”担任，再由分别象征信仰，力量与智慧的三名祭祀辅助。
按照常理，祭典的主祭明明应该选择长门大人才对……
这么随意地选择主祭，本次祭典估计很难达到预期效果…！我是这么认为的。
长门现在，稍微有点棘手啊…唉，果然不能期待什么扫清黑暗迎接光明的效果么……
既然无法彻底控制，就彻底排除在祭典之外。只要最后能获得【海若】，谁把稿子背出来谁都一样哦~
…你居然真的相信祭典的传说了，加贺？
怎么可能…只是既然做了投资，哪怕作为附加产物，祭典本身能有点意外收获就好了。
呵呵，说的也是呢。与其把宝贵的信仰和灵魂用在创造那些缥缈虚无的东西上，还不如…
真…真的好么，这里毕竟是信浓大人的居城……
呵呵，自然是说笑而已~

信仰.say: 好久不见，赤城大人，加贺大人。
天宇启户祭的规矩我们都明白。寒暄一会再说，按流程开始演武吧，代主祭。
呵呵，一上来就是主菜吗？龙凤可比看起来难对付很多，大家不要轻敌哦~
…向神明展现勇武，向神明纳奉才智，向神明给予信仰！

洪流.say: 不愧是身经百战的一航战前辈们…此战是我输了。
赤城大人，加贺大人，以及各位远道而来的客人，欢迎来到天岩岛！
险胜而已~有段日子不见了，变化很大哦，龙凤。
战斗中的眼神坚定，步伐稳健。如果是现在的你，就算去带领重樱的一支航母机动部队也毫无问题哦。
您过奖了，赤城大人。我在各方面都还有不足之处，刚刚的战斗使我更加深刻地认识到了这一点……
呵呵呵，这个是发自内心的评价哦~
在这个弱肉强食的世界，只有像你这样拥有力量的人才能歌唱大义---如果用加贺的风格来说就是这样吧~
继续努力吧。现在所挥洒的每一份汗水，会在将来汇聚为重樱前进的洪流。
重樱的未来，离不开我们每一个人的努力哦。
不胜惶恐…
果然赤城大人还是同记忆中的一样，永远充满着智慧与力量，自信而又坚定…
若是力量不足，便磨练力量。若是智慧不足，便钻研智慧。
不论是对白鹰也好，对皇家也好，对铁血也好，对塞壬也好…重樱失去的一切，我将带领你们亲手夺回来！
是！龙凤，今后也会继续以赤城大人为目标刻苦修炼的！
看着现在的你，仿佛看到了些当年的影子呢…
（当时的你，也处于这种立场之上么………）
……赤城大人？
呵呵，要以我为目标来努力，好大的口气，以后可有的你苦头吃哦~？
龙凤必日益精进武艺，不负嘱托！

另一种战场.say: 天岩岛近海·清晨
呜哇！这里就是信浓大人的居所天岩岛…不输给长门大人居城的气派啊！
天宇启户祭…原本应该是作为“巫女”的长门大人主持的祭典才对，居然被用什么“关心身体”这么敷衍的理由排除在外……
一航战的“前辈”们，看来背地里做了不少工作啊。
这么重大的场合，居然想把我们排除在外…赤城这次又想搞什么把戏？
无妨，不论经历了什么波折，结果来说我们还是受邀按时来到祭典现场了。
没想到“大前辈”的面子还真是吃的开啊…哎嘿嘿，真好啊~我什么时候能变成“大前辈”呢~
再过个几十年的话，也许就说不定了哦？瑞鹤大·前·辈♪
停！翔鹤姐停！我错了！不要继续说下去了！
哈哈哈，大清早就这么精神，年轻真好啊。
不过…在到达天岩岛之前，有一件事，我还是要再强调一遍。
确实，之前赤城在镜面海域内的行为是不可理解的，甚至伤害了重樱的同伴，伤害了你们。
但是今天请以大局为重，无论如何保持克制。我们现在的立场十分不宜与赤城她们发生正面冲突。
如果我的判断不错的话，并不是所有支持赤城的人都知道她的阴谋。
我们需要等待的是祭典结束之后，与信浓会面的机会。
只要能让信浓公开赤城在圣域中与塞壬勾结的事，并且能站在我们一边的话——
赤城将会因为背叛行为在重樱失去立场，其阴谋就自然失败了。
也就是来交朋友的对吧~请大前辈放心，我明白~
社交场也是重要的战场！在皇家，在北方联合，我也参加过数次这种大型聚会了。
这次又有铁血的使团远道而来。哎呀，回想起来这种场合一直都是这种复杂的气氛呢…
不是以刚力对撞，而是如笛声般缠绵，这次是这样的作战吧~
嗯，翔鹤姐也明白了！

战场上学到的事.say: 我是骏河，负责在此接待各位远道而来的客人，请多指教。
你就是传说中的纪伊级三号舰骏河么…嗯，真是百闻不如一见啊！祭典的准备辛苦了。我代表重樱的伙伴们向你表示感谢~
大前辈过奖了…！如您所见我只是一个没什么战斗经验的新人而已，很期待今后能与您并肩作战。
今后？要是并肩作战的话，现在不就可以么。按照祭典规则，接下来是演武环节了吧？
兵贵神速，打起精神放马过来吧！
（哎？这么突然？！这种性格我超不擅长应付啊……）
你刚刚心里在想，“哎？这么突然？！这种性格我超不擅长应付啊……”了吧~
然后又露出了“啊！被看穿了？！！”的表情。最近的年轻人，内心真是太容易读懂了啊…
不愧是三笠大前辈……那个…我冒昧地问一句，为什么…能读懂呢？
哈哈哈，都是些作战的时候学到的技巧罢了。在战场上，分析对手的行为直接关乎生死哦。
听说你的演习成绩很不错，接下来的演武我可是很期待的哦~
能和大前辈交手是求之不得的宝贵经验，还请前辈不吝赐教！
嗯！这就对了，就是这股气势！
（和三笠大前辈交手，偷工减料肯定会被发现吧…真是的，只能全力以赴上了…！）
向神明展现勇武，向神明纳奉才智，向神明给予信仰！纪伊级战列舰，骏河，参上！

来自空中.say: 我从资料上看到过哦，大前辈的舰装似乎缺乏对空作战的设备——
不擅长应付来自空中的威胁，就是大前辈的弱点吧！
所以以身为战舰的自己为诱饵掩护量产型航母，然后利用航空攻击扰乱对方时，再进行反击么…确实是合理的战术。
哎呀哎呀，看来这边也要露点真本事才行了~
设备虽然是旧式的，但如果认为我的战术也是旧式的，可就大错特错了哦！

老骥伏枥.say: 居…居然还有这种操作…？！
也是啊…大前辈也能调用翔鹤和瑞鹤的舰载机进行航空战…果然还是比不过大前辈，是我输了…
好险好险，刚刚好几次都把我逼到危险的位置了。真是后生可畏啊~
嘴上说着陷入危机，然后三两下轻松脱困了…大前辈强到犯规了吧！
（要是能成功预判那次回避的话……不，不行，在那之前我就丧失优势的炮击位置了。）
（可恶…到底是哪一步开始出了问题啊！）
动摇都写在脸上了哦，骏河。
咳！我失态了。
说你后生可畏可不是单纯的客套话而已，你的装备更先进，头脑也很灵光。
如果能拥有和我相同的战斗经验的话，现在我就该是你的手下败将咯~
哎呀，时代真是一直在变化啊~更厚的装甲，更强的火炮，还有天上的那些飞机——
不得不承认，我已经落后于时代了。
（不愧胸襟也是大前辈级的…普通人能轻易承认自己的落伍么…）
正视现实，实事求是可是很重要的哦？
唉…可以的话，我真希望这身战场上磨炼的本领再也不要有用武之地了……
但是就算想解甲归田，也不能在此时抛下重樱不管…
过去的同伴们在离开前曾经托付于我信念——
重樱若病了，就需要医治。重樱若偏离了道路，就算用强硬的手段也要纠正回来。
三笠一边说着，一边握着手中的项珠
在达成目标之前，就算被时代所抛弃，我也不会停下前进的脚步哦？
…我为重樱能有像您一样的大前辈而骄傲!
哈哈哈哈，走吧，祭典会场的大家还等着我们呢~
（空有力量会陷入迷茫，徒有智谋会误入歧途。）
（赤城，那孩子什么时候才能想明白呢……）

备用计划.say: 天岩岛近海·正午
Z2，快一点，都快到午饭时间了啊。
是是是，再耐心点，马上就要记录完毕了。
把整个海域作为封闭空间，屏蔽来自外部的观测，这就是“结界”…重樱内部还真是充满了超自然的存在啊……
超自然的存在？呵，这些不过是我们需要理解但还没有理解的科技而已~
这些先不说。弹药准备如何？
弹药充足。
武器整备呢？
武器状态良好。
Z2真是可靠啊~撤退路线呢？
…………再怎么说也不用准备到这个份上吧？
咳，以防万一，确认一下……
……你怀疑赤城的计划不会顺利进行？
是那家伙认为事有蹊跷啦。临行之前专门要我多留个心眼。
害得我连夜赶了一份从战斗到跑路的方案书给她，唉…
确实…这次赤城的计划看起来是有点太小儿科了。
而且危险。塞壬可不是能任人摆布的棋子哦？
如果她的目的只是像她说的为了动员重樱参加作战计划倒还好，如果不是的话…？
只要能把重樱拖下水，只要重樱还是作为我们的盟友，让谁来领头都一样吧~
呜哇，真差劲…
呵呵，这可是那家伙亲自定下的方针，要我把你刚说的话原样上报么？
千万别，我可吃不消…
完工。最后一处可疑坐标也探测完毕了
是时候登门拜访了。就算是迷路的客人，让主人等太久了可不好哦，呵呵呵…

铁血演武？.say: 一路而来辛苦了，远道而来的铁血朋友们，欢迎莅临天岩岛。
阿贺野级轻巡洋舰能代，受信浓大人的委托，在此恭候各位多时了。
能做为赤色中轴的盟友受邀参与重樱的重大祭典，对铁血来讲也是莫大的荣幸~
请代我们向信浓大人致以最诚挚的问候~
这是一定的。时间不早了，按照计划各位客人请随我直接前往内城…
哎？之前我听赤城介绍祭典流程的时候，对其中一个叫“演武”的环节还挺感兴趣的呢…
啊，那个啊。演武是本次祭典中的重要组成部分，会场中的每一场演武都被视为一次对神明的供奉行为。
不过，演武只针对重樱内的来访成员，来自铁血的诸位就不必辛苦进行战斗了。
那不是太可惜了嘛~入乡随俗，也让我来感受一下重樱的演武吧。
就当做是我的个人请求，拜托了~
唔…好吧。既然您坚持的话，作为接待人自然不能让各位客人扫兴…
向神明展现勇武，向神明纳奉才智，向神明给予信仰——
不才能代，在铁血诸位盟友面前，献丑了！
呵呵呵，究竟是客套话还是真心话。重樱新锐巡洋舰的实力，就让我好好见识一下吧~
铁血海军，欧根亲王号战斗准备完毕！

第一回合.say: 怎么了，重樱新锐巡洋舰只有这点实力么？
看来你刚才所说的献丑不是在开玩笑啊~
（肆意释放的力量，毫不掩饰的杀意…欧根亲王这家伙来真的？！）
（毕竟是客人，冷静…不争一时之强，这里就让一下…）
……实在是漂亮的战术，不愧是拥有丰富经验的历战之舰。
战术？经验？呵，力量不足就会死，这么单纯的道理，重樱的新锐巡洋舰都看不明白么？
至于其他的，对付刚刚的你还用不上那些复杂的东西。
（…得寸进尺！但是，冷静下来…想想招待客人的礼仪………）
请您理解，重樱的演武，并不是上升到实战程度的厮杀…
哎呀，真是失望。作为吾之铁血的盟友，重樱的新锐巡洋舰居然孱弱到如此地步~
明明是，重樱的新锐巡洋舰~真是太令人失望了~
（…………啊啊啊啊，不管了。这种状态下动真格，想必信浓大人也不会怪罪吧！）
不要太过分了，欧根亲王！
虽然是预定之外的事，既然你这么念念不忘，就切身体会一下重樱新锐巡洋舰的威力吧。
我的事怎么都好，侮辱重樱的事，可不能就这么算了！
呵呵呵呵，终于要动真格了么。这才对，这种表情才对哦！
让我们开始愉快的第二回合吧~！

第二回合.say: 有破绽，就是现在！！
到此为止了，能代。退下！
赤城大人？！………是。
听到这么大的动静，我还以为塞壬来攻城了。这是在做什么，欧根？
好险好险~本来只想体验一下重樱的演武，结果差点把自己搭进去。
不是你及时赶到的话，恐怕我就要命丧这位小姑娘的刀法之下咯~
那真是不胜荣幸，能正面击败大名鼎鼎的欧根亲王阁下。
……要不是我及时拦下，你不会真忍不住要下手了吧？
怎么可能~至少这次不会。毕竟是我的挑拨在先嘛~
赤城大人，刚才明明是我快要得手了！
在你那一招命中之前，欧根一轮齐射就能送你回去大修了。
那个破绽，是她为了引诱你到射击位置上故意暴露给你的。
什么？！对不起赤城大人，是我经验不足，失去冷静了……
能代小姐不用太在意。欧根这个性格，挑拨起来就算她自家亲姐姐都受不了。
你刚刚的应对，已经能被写进应对欧根亲王的教科书了。
呼呼，看到这种一本正经的性格，很难忍住不上去调戏一下嘛~
对不起了，能代小姐。刚刚只是我一时起了玩心，说的话都不是真心的，请你千万不要在意~
……在战斗中被挑衅是我经验不足的表现，非常抱歉…
现在都正午了，比预定时间晚到了不少啊欧根，路上玩得开心么？
哪里哪里，你们重樱秘境，海域上结界重重。我们路上走了不少弯路，好不容易才找到正确航线嘛~
（…哎？我明明一直按照约定等在结界入口迎接的…怎么可能……）
呵呵，不愧是铁血的外交使团，口才也是世界一流。
大家既然是通力合作的盟友，有什么需要但说无妨，不用这么客气。
既然直白说到这个份上，唉…我也只好吐露实情了。
我已经快饿死了~！
附议…被欧根亲王呼来唤去折腾了一路，我也快饿扁了。
特意，专门给你们留好了上等席，以及丰盛的午餐！
随我来吧，精彩的节目就要开始了……

sequence: 吾如梦中之蝶，飞舞于虚幻之间
愿光明划破阴云，愿希望指引重樱

阴云.say: 数日前，某处镜面海域内。
空气中弥漫着硝烟，水面覆盖着残骸。
又一处塞壬据点被彻底摧毁了。
…清理完毕，下一处目标在——
Surprise！好久不见，晚上好啊~
喂喂喂，别无视我啊！
……没有和你沟通的必要。
别这么无情嘛，我这边可是积累了一大堆话要说哎~
关键点G姑且不论，你们成员全都是这种个性么…？
一言不合就开火，随便把基地搅个天翻地覆……善后重建可是很辛苦的啊！
自从你们到来后的这几个月，子终端的消耗量和工作占用率整整提升了314个百分点。
关键点G把您召唤过来，肯定不只是为了给我们增加基建成本吧
原来是来打听她的计划的……与你无关，消失吧。
如果这话不是站在这片废墟上说出来，听起来就更有说服力了哦？
算啦~要是能让您心情好一点，请不用在意，继续尽情破坏吧~
其实我知道哦，关键点G已经潜入NA海域中心的事。
只是我怎么都没能从合理性的角度上理解这一行为的意义。
您最近的个人行动无非是想分散我们的战力以及注意力对吧？
看来上次会面之后，她相当动摇啊
要说的话说完了？
等等等等！这片海域就剩下这一个通讯器了！
呼…其实我今天来，是有重大消息要告诉您。
重樱，要准备开始天宇启户祭了哦
这次会收到的，究竟是神明的恩赐呢，还是魔鬼的惩罚呢~？
如果是因为过度依赖神明而导致的灾难，那也是人们咎由自取的
呵呵呵，真是不耿直呢
顺带一提，这个时间点上的赤城似乎对那块石头非常感兴趣呢
如果是有人告诉了她神石真正的能力的话…
通讯被单方面切断了
等！
看来，又得绕一次远路了啊

宴会.say: 天岩岛本岛·日落
在太阳完全消失在地平线下之后，作为祭典前戏的酒宴也到达了高潮阶段
月光下，灯烛与祭典的篝火点亮了夜幕中的天岩岛
伴随着整齐的鼓点，龙凤、能代、骏河伫立在舞台之上
三人高举酒盏，庄重地，向神明奉上祈祷之词
“向神明展现勇武，向神明纳奉才智，向神明给予信仰”
“愿神明指引重樱找到光明之路”
“愿神明庇佑重樱驱灾避祸，祥瑞永存”
“请诸位举杯，向神明奉上贡酒，为重樱祈愿！”
席间
龙凤、能代、骏河，今天三人都辛苦了哦。我代表参会的诸位来宾敬你们一杯~
举行祭典是我们的职责所在，赤城大人千万不用客气！
祭典顺利进行到现在，全靠诸位大人的缜密筹划，我不过是按照计划行事而已
而且赤城大人远道而来参加祭典也十分辛苦，应该是我敬您一杯才对
呵呵呵呵，真是一群出色的后辈们呢~
三笠大前辈…真是好久不见。您还是同记忆中一样的神采飞扬啊
说起来上一次见你的时候，你还没有正式服役吧。当时你还是个跟在…………
一晃这么多年过去了……赤城，现在居然由你在引领重樱前进的方向啊
呵呵呵，大前辈误会了。我不过是在服从八百万众神的旨意，听从调遣罢了
我不在的这段时间里，重樱加入赤色中轴，研究塞壬科技，甚至与昔日的盟友开战…
大前辈，听说您刚刚成立了一个叫新生重樱联合的团体。
赤城拿起酒盏，打断了三笠的说话
已经隐退多时的您选择现在出山，究竟想做些什么呢？
你是说“新生重樱联合”吗，那不过是和一些同好们组成的互助社团，不用在意，不用在意
至于出山的目的嘛…眼看着现在的重樱陷入危局，我怎么能安心置身事外！
希望重樱回归繁荣昌盛，是我们每个人的信念！这一点你们也一样吧？
呵呵~据说从来不愿出门的神巫女长门大人，可是也加入了你们的“社团”哦
作为今晚祈愿仪式压轴环节的主角却至今未到，实在是有些不够尽兴呀~
突然，一只符鸟“嗖”地快速从窗外飞入，瑞鹤扬起刀柄接住了符鸟
五航战，不要在这种场合舞刀弄剑的！翔鹤，好好管教好你的妹妹
瑞鹤看了一眼符鸟，没有理会赤城说的话语
真是不好意思呢，我们家的瑞鹤就是莽撞了点~
真是的，瑞鹤，在三笠大人和赤城大人面前多失礼！啊，你要离开一会？好吧，大家请继续享受宴会~♪
瑞鹤欠了欠身，到三笠身边说了几句悄悄话，便默默地离开了会场
啊哈哈哈，对不住各位，也让海外的友人们见笑了，我代瑞鹤向大家道个不是
不过还真没想到，居然会有盟友不远千里来参加本次祭典，真是让人倍感欣喜啊
不知道重樱的美酒和食物还习惯么，欧根亲王？
非常棒哦~特别是重樱的酒，有种独特的风味呢~
啊哈哈，这酒是由米、米曲和水为原料酿造而成的，在重樱有着上千年的历史了
也会在祭典上作为供奉神明之物而使用哦
用米酿造的吗…原来如此，所以才和铁血这边的黑啤有着截然不同的味道啊
三笠大人如果有机会来到欧罗巴大陆的话，也请务必来品尝下用烘焙麦芽酿造的铁血黑啤呀~呵呵呵
欧罗巴大陆呀…这么说来确实也许久未曾造访了
突然又怀念起在皇家享受红茶红酒的日子了哈哈哈~
在这里就不提皇家那些虚伪的小人了~呵呵，就让我们铁血遵循客道，用心享受重樱的美食吧~
欧根，这个“生鱼片”很好吃，多尝一尝吧
作为辅佐的Z2把食物放到了欧根亲王的盘中
哦？这个啊……
听说要搭配这个绿色的“芥末”才好吃——
把这白色的鱼肉全都沾满绿色……
哈哈哈，你一下也沾太多了
是吗？我们还是不太懂吃法呢
让我来教教各位吧！啊，Z2小姐，请先听我说明啊！
(她就是纪伊级战列舰骏河吗。重樱秘藏的精锐，意外的是个可爱的孩子呢，呵呵……）
欧根，这个串在一起的肉丸也很好吃，大家也多尝一尝吧
刚才还被骏河缠着的Z2，不知什么时候又拿来了新的食物
呵呵呵呵，大家不用客气，夜晚还很长哦~

敌袭.say: 热闹的宴会依然在进行中
不、不愧是三笠大前辈，在那种困境下也能逆转局面啊……
哈哈哈！！北方联合尽是些有趣的家伙啊，还有那个阿芙乐尔---------
突然间，不知从海面上的何处传来了一声明亮的炮响
水平面的彼方，染上了赤色和紫色的光，可以隐约看到漆黑的影子正在逼近——
是、是的！报告各位大人，天岩岛近海突然出现了大批塞壬舰队正在向这里发动突袭！
鬼怒和霞已经带领守备舰队出击，正在与敌人作战！
三笠听闻状况，立刻站起身准备出击，对座的赤城，依然静静地端着酒盏
（天岩岛层层结界，塞壬舰队怎么可能不声不响接近到这个位置…？！）
诸位大人请回座，守卫天岩岛本就是我们代行者的职责，不需惊扰诸位
还请给我们一个尽职的机会！
骏河，能代，跟我一起去增援吧
各位大人请放心，我们一定会负起责任，保护祭典顺利举行的！

临危受命.say: 漆黑的船壳，不祥的光芒，这就是塞壬……
（虽然模拟战斗了无数次，亲眼见到之后，压迫力完全不是一个等级啊——！！）
真是的…！击沉了一艘又会有无数艘填进来，塞壬的舰队是无穷无尽的么？！
（没想到第一次实战机会是出现在这种情况下！！果然当初就不该接下这祭典代行者的任务啊！）
在后方平和的环境中待久了，总会让人产生一丝和平时代的错觉…
塞壬的威胁其实一刻都没有消失！
诸位，难得的实战机会，尽情的展示所学，尽情的战斗吧！

面对棋子.say: 霞，鬼怒？你们那边的敌人清理干净了么，来得正好——
住手，你们这是在做什么…？
这个感觉…和她们平时的气息有所不同
她们不是同伴…是塞壬基于我们的数据而生产出的“棋子”！
大家不要动摇，牢记我们的使命。守护天岩岛，消灭所有来犯之敌！

镜面海域.say: 没有灵魂的仿制品…不过如此，消失吧！
很好，区域肃清！我们快去其他地方增援吧
如果塞壬是瞄准祭典来的，那么神石就可能有危险！
一航战、五航战的前辈甚至三笠大前辈都在本岛，只要我们守住结界外围…
那些是…乌云中散发着紫色的光？！！！
再感受一下水面，和之前的感觉也有所不同
镜面海域。塞壬刚刚把包含天岩岛在内的整片区域，全部转化为了镜面海域
啊，真正的鬼怒和霞，你们平安无事真是太好了~
呼呼，西面的量产型已经被我们压制了哦~
见到龙凤大人的舰载机在此盘旋就立刻赶过来了…西面的量产型已经被我们压制了
气压骤降、风速减弱、海面波浪回归平静，映照出水面的自我…对外电波信号完全屏蔽…确实和记录中的一样
和以往不同的是，镜面海域一般是在“海上”形成的，之前从未见过这样“覆盖岛屿”非自然形成的案例
预测接下来很可能会有更大规模的袭击，龙凤大人，请给予指示
东面是暗礁地区，塞壬理论上应该无法进入，所以并没有部署战力…这究竟是…？
霞，骏河——随我一同前往调查究竟，其他诸位，请务必死守正面航线！

钢铁之花.say: 两个娇小的身影，伴随着一连串爆炸声，游走在塞壬的大军之中
江风！！
——塞壬战舰的一轮齐射再一次在江风身边形成了跨射
…长门大人快退后，这里交给在下便是
可是你已经连续战斗那么久了！！
误入陷阱、让长门大人身陷包围已是失职，在下万死莫辞
只是希望在这柄守护您的剑刃崩坏之前，能为大人战至——
爆风过后，露出的是长门娇小身躯和庞大舰装的身影
长门召唤出的舰装，将再次飞来的炮弹挡了下来
大人！不能为了在下而浪费了大家供奉的信仰啊！这是用来…
笨蛋！木瓜脑袋！！！
诶…诶？
吾可是长门！重樱的战舰·长门！
如果连个重要的人都无法守护，还谈什么祭典，谈什么守护重樱！
大…大人？
长门合上双眼，抬起双手，在胸口祈祷着
见识下BigSeven的力量吧！
长门的炮管发射出的炮弹在空中幻化成光玉，向四散飞去，照亮了夜晚的天空
转瞬，光玉又在空中飞速向一处集中飞去，击破了包围网的一角
这就是…长门大人的实力…
快，从这里就可以突围了！！
长门伸出手，牵引着江风受伤的身躯向突破口驶去——
…然而，增援的塞壬舰船很快又将炮口对准了两人
不要管我了…长门大人
长门没有理会江风的话语，只是拼尽全力地，驱使着巨大的舰装，一边回避着塞壬的炮击，一边反击，在炮火中艰难地行进。
然而不断逼近的塞壬舰队，在长门抵达突破口前的一刻便再次将突破口填满
更大的危机，向二人逼近
重樱不能失去长门大人，这里就算牺牲在下也要让长门大人——
随着一声声爆炸，突破口周围的塞壬应声化为了燃烧着的残骸——
觉悟很棒！但可不能真的在这里葬送了性命啊！
——如果失去了你，长门大人可是会很伤心哦~
瑞鹤的轰炸机精准地在敌人头顶投下爆弹，燃烧的火光再次映红了夜空
得救了…谢谢你，瑞鹤大人——
江风用尽力气向瑞鹤道了谢，便瘫软了下去
江风！！
没事，她只是一下子放松了下来,失去力气罢了~
好好休息一下，接下来…就让我来保护长门大人吧
又被汝救了啊…辛苦了，瑞鹤。
从宴席上收到您放飞的符鸟后便知道了这里的情况，飞速赶来了
诶…宴会那边…不要紧吗？
哼，那样的场面根本不适合我呢，能找机会出来透透气可是再好不过了~
长门、长门大人…
能在暗礁区设下埋伏，没有附近的海况图是做不到的…
这次祭典，本身就是个陷阱，在下不能让您继续冒这样大的风险…！
哼，正因为是这样，吾才更要出面，必须揪出害得江风受伤的罪魁祸首！
对方阻碍我们，必定是想对神石做什么手脚，绝对不能让这样的事情发生！
瑞鹤，能再为我们护航吗，江风需要更多的休息…
放心交给我吧，长门大人！三笠大人在岛上等着您。

重逢.say: 这是…瑞鹤大人，居然是您在此作战？后面同行的是…
啊，这是…是长门大人！！
见到长门，龙凤、骏河和霞立刻行了立礼
这…这就是传说中的神子大人…第一次见到
让神子大人受到塞壬的威胁，实在是属下失职…
不知为何长门大人不提前告知来访路线，属下好安排护卫…
这次是吾…不，是我个人主张的秘密行动，所以并没有声张。并不是汝之过失。
总之，长门大人能够出席真是太好了，原本的祭典还预留了信浓大人和您都不能到场的备选计划呢…
…备选计划！？？是什么样的？
嗯…如果长门大人在子时未能抵达祭典的话…会由同样带有一定巫女血统的山城大人代行祈祷礼——
不好，原来这就是她们的目的——
江风，抱歉了，你还能正常行动吗？
只是正常航速行驶的话已经没问题了，长门大人
接下来必须赶上下半场的宴会了，江风！
咳，这个时候居然还有塞壬的“棋子”出现吗
这里就交给我们吧，长门大人，请您尽快前往本殿，三笠大人等人都在等您呢
那么，一切就拜托了！

疑心暗鬼.say: 天岩岛本岛·子时
看来长门大人似乎是在路上迷路了呢~
真是的，三笠大人为何不带着长门大人一同前往呢，万一遭到塞壬攻击这种事，也好有个照应不是吗~
长门已经不是当年那个不成熟的孩子了，她完全可以按自己的想法行事~
倒是赤城殿下似乎对于现状有一点…开心的样子？
哪里哪里，只不过是酒劲上头了罢~天岩岛自酿的酒果然名不虚传啊哈哈哈，加贺你说是吧
那么，在信浓大人无法现身，长门大人又赶不及的情况下…依照传统，必须得有巫女血统的孩子来进行祈祷仪式…

看来神秘人这次也是被塞壬给利用了啊
！！赤城大人？可是…为什么不在现场揭穿她？
神秘人的目的是摧毁神石，如果当场揭穿的话，以赤城这孩子的性格，也许真的会以命相护的吧
三笠大人居然想到了这个份上…真是令在下敬佩
原来如此，怪不得神秘人一走，赤城她们就立刻急着离开
赤城这孩子，目的很单纯，只不过就是用错了手段，希望她能有迷途知返的一天吧…
啊啊啊！！
霞..怎么了？突然从楼梯上大惊小叫地跑下来？
信浓...信浓..信浓大人…
醒来了！！

sequence: The storm rages across the waters, through a night that knows no end.
Within the tempest lingers one lonesome vessel.
Will the storm's rage first be quelled, or will this vessel first capsize?
Will a ray of light bring hope through the darkness?
For I am but an oneiric butterfly, fluttering among illusions.
May light guide this vessel. May hope guide the Sakura Empire.

The Sound of Sapphires.say: Sakura Empire - An island within the Diadem of Light
(Clink, clank!)
Aaaah! Ryuuhou, watch out!!
The destroyer, Hibiki, was careening down a flight of stairs, her balance failing her as she struggled to contain an armful of ceremonial items.
(Clang! Bam! Crash!)
She falls over in panic, dropping the ceremonial items all over the place.
Owie...
You're so mean, Ryuuhou! You could've helped me!
Next to her is Ryuuhou, a former submarine tender who had been converted into a light carrier. She effortlessly avoided the destroyer, catching the ceremonial items in mid-air.
Don't whine to me. We shipgirls don't get hurt so easily. And didn't I tell you to be careful with these ceremonial items?
Hey, can't you show at least a little concern for me?
We're nearly ready to begin the ritual, so please do tread with a little more care from now on.
...Speaking of the ritual, will you-know-who really be there?
Any and all from the Sakura Empire will surely come.

Remember what she said? "Let us hold a historic ceremony and make an offering to the gods. It shall show the Sakura Empire the way forward, giving unto it a brighter future free of threats from the likes of foreign nations or the Sirens."
So this is where you were, Ryuuhou.
Ah, Noshiro. Good to see you. Do you need something?
I'm here to forward the message from our Iron Blood guests: "We will participate in the ritual." Or so they said, but they seem to have gotten lost.
In other words... this is the first time we'll be holding a ritual with outsiders present.
Noshiro, would you please escort them here?
...Certainly. I will do so at once.

However, I need you to do something, Ryuuhou. An offering in which the ships participating in the ritual compete for glory – a Combined Fleet exercise – is necessary as a display of the Sakura Empire's strength.
I would like you to prepare the event for the participants, as well as decide on how to conduct the matches.
Very well. Organizing events is not my forte, but I will focus all my attention on it.
*knock* *knock*
Ryuuhou, Akagi's crew are about to arrive any minute now.
The First Carrier Division! I knew they'd come!
It is time to make our move, Ryuuhou.
...Yes, of course.
This ritual will decide the future of the Sakura Empire.
As representatives of our great land, we must not fail!
Now, everyone, get into your respective positions!
Understood!
After years of suffering... No, we've been training for this very moment, and it is time to show the entire world our might!
The venue bursts with activity as everyone begins getting into the positions they've been assigned.

sequence: The Sakura Empire's oceans are enveloped in the zeal to carry out the ritual.

Undercurrent.say: Sakura Empire - Diadem of Light
The Sakura Empire. It consists of many numerous islands and is a superpower with a distinctive culture.

Away from its mainland there are six remote islands, collectively known as the Diadem of Light. The islands are connected by suspension bridges, forming the shape of a bright sun, or perhaps a snow crystal.

Due to their isolation from the main islands, the Diadem of Light is believed to be the resting grounds of an immense spiritual power. Many conduct pilgrimages to these distant islands in order to hold their rituals and ceremonies.
The Diadem of Light, huh... They picked a good place.
Indeed. It is like one big Sanctuary, a place where people's beliefs and faiths congregate.
For being called "Decisives," the higher-ups certainly devote a lot of energy to something so pointless...
You don't have any faith in their plans, Akagi?
It's a waste of human resources. It's not like they only expended their thoughts and prayers. They even used one of our "Catalysts," and for what purpose? A useless girl who slumbers.
From what I've heard, she's far from useless! They say that she can see everything that is happening, and can even conduct a ritual from within her slumber! Although, they're just rumors...
Anyone who believes in those vacuous rumors is a pitiable fool.
That whole "cleansing the darkness within the Sakura Empire" song and dance is getting old.
But what do you believe, Yamashiro? As you are the spiritual expert here, I would love to hear your opinion.
O-of course! Umm, let me start by explaining the ritual!

The Diadem of Light houses one of the Sakura Empire's great artifacts - a divine stone said to come from the oceanic deity, Watatsumi. When the blood moon rises, the seal placed upon this artifact is lifted.

By offering the faith stored within various ceremonial items and praying to Watatsumi using this artifact as a catalyst, we can tap into the deity's powers to will ships into existence, even those who never truly existed.
And Suruga, I've heard, was created through that very process to serve as its messenger!
The ritual itself was originally carried out by the Sakura Empire's shrine maiden, and was supposed to be both ceremonious and festive in nature.
Common sense says that means Lady Nagato would serve as Watatsumi's host, but...
Because of how haphazardly we selected the host this time, I don't think things will go as intended! That's my opinion, anyway.
Right now, Nagato is... Never mind. I suppose you never know with how capricious these deities can be.
She won't be making an appearance. She's currently taking care of something with Shoukaku, Zuikaku, and Mikasa.
Besides, if all that's truly is to recite some fancy ritual verses, then anyone could do that.
Please tell me you don't believe that absurd gossip, Kaga.
Of course I don't. But while I don't want back everything I've invested, I do hope to get something out of this ritual.
And you will get it. Not through clinging onto vague prophecies, or wasting prayers and artifacts...
I'm sorry for butting in, but... I'm not entirely sure what you're talking about, but isn't that dangerous to say, Akagi? What if somebody overhears you?
Heehee, it was nothing more than a joke. Don't worry.

The First Host.say: We welcome you to the Diadem of Light. I am Ryuuhou, and I will serve as your guide.
Ah, how nice it is to see you after so long, Ryuuhou.
Likewise. It is good to see you and Kaga are in good health.
Yeah, yeah. We already know the rule. "Participants in the ritual must demonstrate their might as a show of respect."
...Kaga, do not underestimate her. Even if she's a light carrier, she must be powerful if she is in charge of organizing the ritual.
Indeed. All I do is for the Sakura Empire's future!

Advancing Waves.say: As expected of the esteemed original First Carrier Division... I've been bested.
Allow me once more to welcome you to the Diadem of Light. We are honored to have guests visiting us from afar.
Apologies, we couldn't afford to go easy on you.
Having said that, you've matured magnificently, Ryuuhou. You would be a perfect fit for the Sakura Empire's Carrier Task Force.
I am grateful for your praise. However, as much as it shames me to admit, I still have many things to learn. I'm afraid I wouldn't be ready for such an important position...
That wasn't flattery, it was my honest evaluation of you.
If you'll pardon me emulating Kaga: we live in a kill-or-be-killed world, and only those like you with power can bring it justice.
Tomfoolery aside, you have done a fantastic job on your ritual preparations.
The Sakura Empire's future depends on our combined efforts. What do you say we work together?
It would be an honor. I shall work as hard as I can towards my goal of one day becoming a part of the Carrier Task Force!
On another note... I was surprised to see you attend this exercise at all, Akagi. There shouldn't be any need for the Sakura Empire's de facto leader to attend...
Oh, no. It's times like these when we need to cooperate.
Be it rituals, Siren technology, or even the Decisives, the Sakura Empire will use anything at its disposal.
(I'm sure even Amagi would've done this if she could.)
Hehe, it strangely feels like I'm looking at a younger version of myself.
Never mind that. Good luck in your further pursuits, Ryuuhou.

Another Battlefield.say: Diadem of Light - Surrounding Waters
So this is the Diadem of Light... It gives off a totally different vibe compared to the main islands, or even from Lady Nagato's sanctuary...
Lady Nagato should be the one conducting the ritual to begin with. I'm astonished that they would exclude her from it due to "unforseen circumstances."
It seems the First Carrier Division has done a lot of work behind the scenes...
They might be trying to get rid of us, seeing as they were behind that one Mirror Sea appearance. I can't help but wonder if Akagi and Kaga really ARE working the Sirens...
It's too early to presume that, Zuikaku. We did make it here without incident, did we not?
Well, you could be right, Mikasa. You're a veteran after all, so you probably have a better feel for these things than I do. One day, I wanna be as renowned as you!
Just give it a few more decades and the title will be yours, "Great Veteran" Zuikaku~
Don't call me that! That's super embarrassing!
Ahahahah, it is good that you're so energetic this early in the morning. However, we have a serious topic to discuss.
Zuikaku, Shoukaku, there is something I want to confirm with you before we arrive at the islands.
It is true that the Akagi you met in the Mirror Seas was behaving strangely, and you could interpret her actions as being harmful to us, her fellow compatriots.
However, she is now one of the leaders of the Sakura Empire. It would be unwise to do anything that would directly aggravate her.
Unless my assumptions are wrong, only a select few individuals within the Sakura Empire would know of Akagi's actions inside the Sanctuary.
And given that the Mirror Seas are Siren creations, we cannot be sure that those you met inside the Mirror Sea – Akatsuki and Yamashiro – were really them or not.
...Though admittedly, Shoukaku was real. As were Akagi and Kaga.

What I'm getting at is, we are participating in the ritual to discover what Akagi's true motive is. If Shinano is truly all-aware, then she would know whether Akagi is colluding with the Sirens, or still stands on our side.
In other words, we're here to make some new friends! Don't worry, I'm good at that!
You could say that. We will soon learn who really has our backs when it matters. Both on the playing field and the battlefield.
We've had many chances to do this with the Northern Parliament and the Royal Navy, but now that Iron Blood has gotten involved, I doubt our regular methods will work...
Indeed. We may have to improvise.
The ritual host should be be here soon, so let's get ready to do this!

The Second Host.say: I am Suruga, the host of the ritual. It must've been a long journey for you all. Thank you for coming, Mikasa, Shoukaku, and Zuikaku.

So you're the fabled third Kii-class battleship. I can hardly believe my eyes... Nevertheless, you have done an awe-inspiring job on the ritual thus far. I thank you on the behalf of all the Sakura Empire.
Thank you. However, I did only what anyone in my position would do. I don't deserve any special praise for that...
Hahah! You'll bore people if you're overly modest. From what I've heard, not only did you make the preparations for the joint exercise, you've even offered to take part in it yourself.
You've heard correct... That is the plan.
Even though it's just an exercise, we'll have to show off our stuff since the Iron Blood is also here. How about a quick duel so I can see your power?
(What?! Right now?! Oh no, I'm not good at dealing with people like her...!)
Aha! You just shouted "What?! Right now?!" in your mind, didn't you?
And next, you're going to think, "How did she know that?!" Good grief, you youngsters are so predictable these days...
W-wow...! If you'll pardon me asking, how did you know what I was thinking?
From experience, I suppose. When you're always trying to figure out what the enemy is thinking, you get pretty close to being able to actually read minds.
Now, I've heard you're extremely skilled in theory, but I'd like to see if your ability holds up when put into practice!
If that is a direct order, then I shall comply with it. As you wish, I shall hold nothing back...!
That's the spirit. Show us what you're capable of!
(She'll easily tell if I'm going easy on her. I'll need to take this battle seriously...!)
Let us begin! Raise your weapons!

Suruga's Tactics.say: That they are. I've been informed that your rather outdated rigging is ill-suited for dealing with aircraft.
To take advantage of that, I have requested airstrikes from the mass-produced carriers positioned further behind me. Soon enough, victory shall be mine...!
You used yourself as a distraction to keep the carriers safe while they launch their airstrikes to corner me... A very smart strategy.
Unfortunately, you made a fatal mistake! You assumed my tactics are as outdated as my rigging!

Joint Operation.say: Oh, riiiight, joke's on me...
Your "we" and "us" were of course referring to Zuikaku's and Shoukaku's support... *Sigh*, I never stood a chance against you, did I? I admit defeat.
Don't be too hard on yourself. You nearly had me for a moment there.
Perhaps, but you turned the tables on me in the blink of an eye... I see now how you've earned your reputation...
(I know about her rigging inside out, and I maintained my distance properly... Even excluding the surprise airstrike, I shouldn't have lost this!)
(I don't even have any idea of what I did wrong! This person is a monster!)
Let me guess: you're thinking "this person is a monster," aren't you?
Ah, n-no, well, I don't mean it that way...!
Good. I was afraid I scared you off.
Even with your liberal use of airstrikes, you attacked me with rational tactics. You didn't simply rely on your perception of having an overwhelming advantage and charge straight at me.
Hahah! Nevertheless, I must say these changing times are wonderful. Engines, cannons, and aircraft are all stronger than ever.
I'm forced to admit that I am very much stuck in the past.
(She can casually admit how old-fashioned she is? Spoken like a true veteran...)
But do not pity me. A soldier cannot do their duty if they ignore the truth.
I wish an old-timer such as myself wouldn't need to fight, but the world is blind to age.
When the Sakura Empire needs me, I will not stand by and watch. I will do everything necessary to fulfill my obligations to my nation.
That is my duty. The duty which my past comrades entrusted me with. The duty I must and will carry out, no matter how the times may change.
Mikasa held her hand before her chest and clenched it into a fist.
I have heard that other factions will participate in the ritual. From my experiences, I am concerned about whether or not these islands will be sufficiently protected during the ritual.
Of course. I appreciate your thoughtfulness and apologize for any concern caused.
Ahahaha! Okay, Zuikaku, Shoukaku. It's time to head onto the main islands!
(The empty pursuit of power leads to ruination, and the empty pursuit of knowledge leads one astray.)
(Akagi, how long will it take you to understand...?)

Plan B.say: Diadem of Light - Surrounding Waters
Are you done yet, Thiele? It's almost time for lunch.
I'm doing the best I can... I'll be done recording soon, so just wait a little longer.
They've created an enclosed space within this area of the sea, one that cannot be observed from the outside. It's like a magic boundary created using Siren technology.
It's not magic; our technology is just not sufficiently advanced yet.
More importantly, how's your ammo?
I have plenty of it.
And your rigging?
Everything is functioning normally.
That's a good girl. And our escape route?
I have one secured, but I doubt we'll need it.
Heheh, you never know. Just in case~
Do you think Akagi's plan is going to fall through?
I'm not worried about it, but the lady in charge is.
I even had to draft this backup plan just to sate her paranoia.
I see... Still, this plan Akagi came up with is really naïve.
Not to mention dangerous. The Sirens are not easily fooled.
We should be fine if it goes as planned and we can use this ritual as a way to bolster our forces. If it doesn't, however...
As long as the Sakura Empire ends up taking the fall for whatever happens, it shouldn't really matter who is leading them, right? This whole thing leaves a bad taste in my mouth though.
I know, but it's still awful.
The bottom line is, these are our orders. Are you having second thoughts?
No, absolutely not...
Okay, I made a final sweep and saved our coordinates.
Good. Now then, let's stop pretending like we're lost and head over to them. We don't want to make them wait around too long~

The Third Host.say: Visitors from Iron Blood, I bid you welcome to the Diadem of Light.
I am Noshiro, Agano-class light cruiser. I've been waiting for your arrival.
It is our honor as fellow members of the Crimson Axis to have been invited here.
On behalf of the Iron Blood, I would also like to express my words of gratitude to Lady Shinano and the people of the Sakura Empire.
We are glad to hear it. Now, if you would please follow me, I shall guide you to your accommodations for the–
Pardon, but wasn't there a rule that calls for an opening performance of sorts? "Participants in the ritual must demonstrate their might as a show of respect," I believe?
That is correct. We do conduct exercise battles as a show of respect.
However, that is only required of citizens of the Sakura Empire. We will not force our guests to take part in such a thing.
That's quite a pity. I was so looking forward to immersing myself within the rich customs of the Sakura Empire.
That would be difficult to make happen...
Think of it as a favor to us. Surely the host wouldn't want their guests to miss out on an enjoyable activity, would they?
...Difficult, but not impossible. Without a doubt, a host's job is to make their guests feel welcome. And if that is what you desire, then we can do so.
However, I'm a little rusty, so you'll have to forgive me. Please brace yourselves for combat.
Hah, isn't this what you were hoping for to begin with?
In either case, I'm curious to see what you're made of, Noshiro...

Inciters.say: Come on. I thought you were a cutting-edge cruiser, but this is all you have?
Perhaps you weren't being as humble as I thought when you said you were rusty.
(We may have used exercise shells, but she didn't fight like this was an exercise! She held nothing back...!)
(She deserves to be reprimanded for going too... No, I need to calm down. They're our guests, after all.)
You fought wonderfully, Prinz Eugen. It is no wonder you have recieved so many medals.
I "fought wonderfully"? That was hardly a fight at all.
I could fight someone of your caliber in my sleep.
(This woman... You're really trying my patience now...!)
Is that so? Well, I am honored that you held nothing back on me, as this was merely an exercise battle.
God almighty, I can't believe we call you our allies. If they call you one of the Sakura Empire's most advanced cruisers, then we'd be better off without the help of your land of Neanderthals.
I'm utterly disappointed. Come on, Thiele. We're going home.
You're not going anywhere, Prinz Eugen!
If you so desperately want to see why I am a cutting-edge light cruiser, then I'll be more than glad to show you.
Insulting me is one thing, but I will not let your affront to the Sakura Empire go unpunished!
Ah, are you finally going to get serious? Good! I thought you never would!
Now, give me the fight I came here for!

Trickery.say: BOOOOOM!
This is my chance...!
That's enough, Noshiro! Step back!
A-Akagi...?! Very well, I shall...
Goodness gracious, it sounded like the Sirens were attacking us... What are you doing, Eugen?
Thanks for saving me, I suppose. I came here as a peaceful tourist, hoping to get a closer look at the Sakura Empire's fine traditions.
But if you hadn't showed up, this girl would've turned me into mince meat.
If that really is true, then we are honored to know that Noshiro fought THE Prinz Eugen face-to-face and nearly defeated her.
Let's not beat around the bush. You were trying to sink her, weren't you?
Of course not, I came here just to enjoy myself. Guess I must have struck a nerve.
Akagi, I nearly defeated her!
There is no "almost" here. You either defeat someone, or you don't. She could've sent you straight to the drydock with just a single volley.
What you saw wasn't a chance to defeat her, it was a deceptive maneuver to lure you within range of her guns.
What?! ...I apologize, Akagi. I lost control over myself.
She shouldn't have escalated it after Eugen provoked her, but I can't blame her for doing so
If it were Hipper, she would've exploded with rage after Eugen's first remark. Noshiro, by comparison, lasted much longer before retaliating.
Heheh, I'm sorry. I can't stop myself from poking fun at people who take themselves too seriously.
Let's make it up to you with a little gift. If you'd like one, that is. Perhaps you wouldn't?
There is no need. I am also to blame for escalating the situation. And for that, I sincerely apologize.
If you don't mind me asking: I noticed you two arrived here quite late. You didn't get lost on the way here, did you?
Lost isn't the right word. Your waters are unfamiliar territory to us, that's all. It wasn't easy to find our way here.
...Pardon? I stood and waited by the barrier's entrance, as promised. I'm not sure how you could've missed me...
Ah, of course it wasn't...
Given that we are allies, what need is there to hide things from us? Let me rephrase: HOW did you get lost on the way here? Could you please tell me?
Hah, it's no use to try hiding the truth from you, I suppose.
Let me tell you then. We...
Are starving! Too hungry to think straight!
Indeed. We're so hungry that we're about to collapse from exhaustion.
*Sigh*...
Understandable. We can't let our dear guests go hungry. Noshiro, would you please guide them inside the island?
After all, we wouldn't want them to miss the ritual...

sequence: "Never lose faith." ...That is what Great Veteran Mikasa told me.
I chose to have faith in my comrades. In Akagi, and in Kaga.
But could they have betrayed us to the Sirens...?
We've all been searching for the truth after what happened at "Sanctuary."
Fortunately, Mikasa, Nagato, Mutsu, and Kawakaze... they trusted me.
And those who I met in the Mirror Sea were all fine in the end...
But, nobody else seems to remember any of that happening...
You may not know anything about what is happening at this ceremony...
Even if that's the case, please...
I just know you'll figure it out...

Dark Clouds.say: A few days prior, in a Mirror Sea...
The remnants of facilities that should not possibly exist in this era, cleaved apart cleanly by a flurry of masterful strokes, told a self-evident story.
The Sirens had created yet another Mirror Sea.
...Purification complete. Moving towards the next location.
Oh my, what a surprise. I didn't expect to see you here.
Hey, it's rude to ignore others when they're talking to you.
...I have nothing to say to you.
Don't be like that. There's plennnty of things I'd like to talk to you about.
Putting aside that Code G issue... Um, what was your name again, "Ember?" Are all of you like this?
You just show up unannounced and start vandalizing other peoples' stuff. Don't you feel sorry for the one who has to rebuild all of this?
Since you bunch showed up, my computational load and resource usage has gone up 314%, you know?
The reason Code G summoned you here wasn't just to poke and prod at us, right?
...So you came to learn more about her plans. Get lost, that has nothing to do with you.
Excuse me? Just take a look around us, and you're saying it has nothing to do with me?
But it's fine. We don't have any further use for this place anyway, so have fun recycling it for us.
I already know where Code G is hiding.
You might act like she sent you here to disrupt our operations, but...
Why'd she go into hiding? Was it that shocking, meeting the "Commander" of this world?
...Are you done running your trap?
Who knows? But this is the last working communication device in this area. I did have some important news for you, but if you don't want to hear it~
Maybe I'll tell you just one more thing.
The Sakura Empire is about to hold their "Dawning Ceremony."
What...?!
This time, will they receive the blessing of a god, or the curse of a demon?
If the overreliance upon these "gods" brings calamity to the world, I suppose it would be well-deserved.
That's not what you really think, is it? You know better, don't you?
The entity that the humans named "Watatsumi"...
Oh, and by the way, the Akagi of this world seems to have taken an interest in that stone as well~
(The communication cuts off)
Wait, come back!
Once again, it seems like I must walk the tortuous path...!

Banquet.say: Diadem of Light - Sunset
On the eve of the ceremony's commencement, a large banquet was held across the islands.
The islands were well-equipped with facilities for holding various rituals and ceremonies.
Despite the distance from the Sakura Empire's seat of power and prosperity, the banquet tonight seemed no less grandiose than the most sumptuous of Royal or Sardegnian feasts.
However, this banquet was not for the merriment of its guests. It was the opening ceremony to a ritual; the first of many offerings to the gods.
The reason the opening ceremony was turned into a welcoming banquet for guests from afar was simply out of convenience.
Instead of celebrating, many of the participants were busy discussing the coming ceremony.
Though the atmosphere seemed cordial on the surface, everyone was mindful of an almost-palpable tension.
As was customary of so many of the Sakura Empire's ceremonies, one could not help but to act respectful.
Banquet Venue
Ryuuhou, Noshiro, Suruga. I wanted to thank you for your work preparing the ritual.
I only did what was expected of me as a proud citizen of the Sakura Empire. There is no need for thanks.
Indeed. If anything, you deserve our thanks, Akagi. We could only make the preparations because you convinced the higher-ups.
And I am simply honored to be involved in the preparations you made possible. And, my goodness, you're even participating in the ritual yourself!
Oh please, you flatter me so.
Ah, how good it is to see you, Mikasa. I'm relieved to see you're in good health.
Hahah! Likewise. When I last saw you, you were serving–
Sorry, never mind. I would hate to be a party pooper.
Your heroic work in leading the Sakura Empire forward is truly commendable.
Why, I appreciate your kind words, but I am simply doing as the gods instruct me to.
In the years I was away, you founded the Crimson Axis with the Iron Blood, began research on Siren technology, and even declared war on the Eagle Union and Royal Navy...
Yes, and when you created the Reborn Combined Fleet, I let things run their course, just as the gods told me to.
Akagi raised her cup to hide her lips then whispered a question to Mikasa.
What are the odds that you would show yourself now of all times, having retired so long ago, Mikasa?
The Reborn Combined Fleet? That's just a side show of mine. You don't need to concern yourself with it.
And what's so strange about me showing myself "now of all times"? I have as much right to be here as any other citizen of the Sakura Empire does.
We are all concerned about the Sakura Empire's future and are prepared to do anything for it. Is that not so?
Of course it is. By the way, I have been informed that Lady Nagato will not be attending the ritual.
Rumors have circulated that she has already awoken from her slumber and is now under the care of your Reborn Combined Fleet. Though that is only a rumor, I have reason to–
Akagi was interrupted by the sound of a loud crash.
What was that?!
Its cause: Zuikaku, hiding away in a corner of the venue. She had dropped her porcelain cup.
I'm terribly sorry for the ruckus, Akagi! Zuikaku's hand slipped and she dropped her cup!
How could you be so careless in front of everyone, Zuikaku?! Goodness... Please, pay us no heed. We shall be on our way now. Please enjoy the rest of the banquet~
Zuikaku bowed in respect, then left the venue with Shoukaku without saying anything.
Sorry, that was an embarrassment on our part. I'd better apologize to our Iron Blood visitors, on behalf of Zuikaku.
Though, I must say, I'm quite surprised to see you all the way out here...
If you'll pardon the question: Is our cuisine to your liking?
It's quite good, actually. This sake in particular has caught my attention.
As it would. It's made with malted rice and water, refined through a brewing method unique to the Sakura Empire.
It is also often used in rituals, where it is given as an offering to the gods.
Malted rice, you say... That explains why it tastes so different from beer.
Should your journey ever take you to the Iron Blood, you should most certainly give our schwarzbier a try.
Ah, it's been long since I was last near your continent, much less the Iron Blood itself. Still, I have many fond memories of that time.
Such as when my old friends and I enjoyed a banquet together with the Royal Navy! Hahahah!
Let's not talk about those tea-swiggers, it gives me headaches. I'd rather flex my privileges as a guest here and savor your gourmet cooking.
Eugen, I brought a plate of sashimi. Would you like some?
Z2, also known as Georg Thiele, was the girl tasked with assisting Prinz Eugen. Before even waiting for Eugen's answer, she put the plate of fish down on the table.
Oh dear, don't tell me you've...
Apparently, you're supposed to eat it with some of this paste spread on it. I believe it's called "wasabi"?
I coated the sashimi in an even layer of it, as I believe you're supposed to.
Err, you've put far too much on it.
Oh, really? Sorry, we're not particularly familiar with how to prepare these things.
In that case, allow me to inform you! ...Please, Thiele, stop! Don't eat it!
(That must be her... Suruga, the Kii-class battleship. So jittery, but in a charming way. Heheh...)
Eugen, I've heard these skewers are quite good as well. I suggest we give them a taste.
Suruga dragged Z2 off somewhere, but it didn't take long for her to sneak away. She then came back with a different plate of food.
Please, enjoy the banquet to your heart's content. The night is still young~

Enemy Attack.say: As the night continued, everyone continued to enjoy the banquet until...
As expected, Mikasa... You're always able to turn the tables in the face of adversity...
Hahahah! I was lucky to have survived, if you ask me! Avrora, meanwhile–
Far from the banquet venue, the sound of a cannon echoed far and wide.
The horizon was painted red and purple from muzzle flashes. Indistinct shadows rose from beneath the waves.
What was that?! Are the Sirens attacking?!
Th-They are! Several fleets of them suddenly appeared just beyond the place I was standing guard!
Kinu and Kasumi rallied some others and are on their way to intercept them!
In the blink of an eye, the venue fell silent. The air became tense as the ships braced for combat.
(I thought the islands were protected by a barrier? How did the Sirens get here?!)
Everyone, please remain calm! Our flawless defenses will protect us!
Even if they should fail, we will keep you safe no matter what!
Suruga, Noshiro, it's time to sortie, immediately!
No Siren shall lay as much as a finger on our guests as long I stand!

The Siren Menace.say: Suruga, are you hanging in there? This is your first battle with Sirens, isn't it?
(I've fought against them countless times in simulations, but those were nowhere near as persistent as these things are!)
Agh...! There's no end to them! We sink one, and two take its place!
(Just my luck! It's my first real battle, and I'm struggling to keep up! I should've never signed up for this thing!)
The Sirens haven't attacked the main islands for a long time, so I haven't had much experience with them...
But now I know just how menacing they are...!
Everyone! We need to hold this position and fight with everything we have!

Pawns.say: Kasumi! Kinu! You've held out well! Now get over here and–
What are you doing?! Stop the friendly fire!
I don't believe that was an accident... Something feels wrong about them...!
Because "they" aren't Kasumi and Kinu! They're pawns the Sirens created based on their data!
Of course... The Sirens always play dirty!
Don't let their appearances fool you, everyone! Protect the islands from these impostors!

Mirror Sea.say: We've swept this sector clean! Come on, we must hurry to the next one and provide support!
...Ryuuhou, what do you think the Sirens' goal is? Are they after... Watatsumi?
They might be after the First and Fifth Carrier Divisions and Mikasa. But no matter what they're after or what they do, they shall not have it.
Of course not. We'll fight to the last... Wh-What's happening to the sky?!
That doesn't seem to be all... Our instruments are starting to malfunction.
It's the Sirens' doing. We just got here from across the islands, and it seems this entire region has turned into a Mirror Sea.
I'm fine. We took care of all the mass-produced units in our sector, then rushed over here when we spotted your recon planes.
Abnormal weather phenomena, loss of communication with the outside... it's just like what the records said...
But there's one key difference. Previously, Mirror Seas were known to only occur over water. There have been no instances of them covering the land as well.
We may not be able to stop this Mirror Sea merely by defeating the Sirens this time. Ryuuhou, what should we do next?
There's no time to think about that. The next wave of attacks is coming our way already.
This area is surrounded by reefs... There's no way the Sirens should have been able to cross from underwater, so how did they...
Kasumi, Suruga, come with me to assess the situation. The rest of you, establish a defensive line here!

The Great Fox.say: In a sea surrounded by darkness, two girls were trying to make their escape.
Kawakaze!
Shells from Siren battleships rained down ceaselessly around Kawakaze.
Lady Nagato, please stand back! I shall deal with this!
What are you saying?! Your equipment is already in tatters!
Falling into the Sirens' trap and endangering Lady Nagato is an unforgivable sin...
Allow me to atone for my transgressions with my life!
The thunderous roar of a cannon was followed by an explosion...
But when the smoke cleared, it was a mass-produced Sakura battleship that lay in ruins, not Kawakaze.
Lady Nagato, why would you expend your power to protect me...
What are you saying, you fool!
Lady Nagato?
I am Nagato, Nagato of the Sakura Empire!
If I cannot protect even a single comrade, how am I to protect the Sakura Empire?
Lady... Nagato...
Having failed to secure the kill, the Siren battleship's movements stopped briefly. Seizing upon that moment...
Witness the power of the Big Seven!
BOOOM!!!
The massive guns that bore the weight of protecting a nation rang out. Such power tore apart the enemy with ease.
In an instant, the enemy forces were engulfed in a sea of fire, and the Siren siege began to fall apart.
Lady Nagato, your power...!
Kawakaze!!
Nagato extended her hand to the injured Kawakaze, half towing her towards their escape route.
...However, the enemies began to close in on the encumbered Nagato once more.
Lady Nagato, please put me down! You must make it out!
Ignoring Kawakaze's protests, Nagato raised her formidable rigging, firing back at the encroaching enemies while doing her best to avoid their barrage.
As Nagato tried to carve out an escape route with her attacks, more Sirens quickly arose to take the place of the fallen.
Lady Nagato!
Kawakaze broke free from Nagato and used the last of her power to charge forward.
The Sakura Empire needs you... Lady Nagato, you must live on...!
Suddenly, several bombs rained down upon the approaching Siren forces.
While your spirit is commendable, you mustn't follow through with that!
Do you know how sad Nagato would be if she lost you?!
The night sky glowed brightly with explosions from Zuikaku's dive bombers, which brought an end to their crisis.
Zuikaku... I am in your debt...
In a mix of exhaustion and relief, Kawakaze fell into Zuikaku's bosom.
Kawakaze!
Don't worry. She's just overwhelmed from having strained herself.
You can rest now. That's a good girl.
You saved me once again... Thank you, Zuikaku.
Ah, um, I just happened to be passing by!
R-really?
Yeah, I was just leaving the banquet when these Sirens suddenly showed up, so I thought I'd go teach them a lesson.
Lady Nagato...
If the Sirens are here, they must be after Watatsumi...
There's no reason for you to go out of your way to take such a big risk...
I disagree. I should be the one to conduct this ritual.
More importantly, if the Sirens truly are after Watatsumi, we must never let their plans come to fruition.
Zuikaku, can I leave Kawakaze with you? She needs to rest.
Of course! Lady Nagato, Mikasa is waiting for you on the island!

Reunion.say: Zuikaku?! It's not safe over there! Hurry up and get over here... huh?
The shocked ceremony hosts went rigid as they hurried to bow to Nagato.
Lady Nagato... This is Kasumi's first time... meeting you...
Your appearance... I am utterly disappointed at myself for not protecting you from the Sirens!
Lady Nagato, I had no idea you were coming, so I did not prepare an escort beforehand...
Be at ease. I simply came here out of my own selfishness. You are not at fault here.
I am relieved that you are here, Lady Nagato! We were at a loss as to what to do in case of an emergency...
Hmm? What did you plan to do...?
Um, if Shinano was unable to carry out the ritual, then the plan was to have Yamashiro do it...
Kawakaze, are you feeling better now?
Yes. If it's just sailing, then I'll be ok...
Then let us hurry to the Diadem of Light.
Siren pawns... why now of all times...?!
Leave this to us. Lady Nagato, please head to the island now.
Very well. I'm counting on you!

Encroaching Suspicions.say: Diadem of Light
I see, so if I'm understanding this correctly, Nagato dragged herself all the way out here, got lost, and ran into trouble?
Mikasa, if you wanted Nagato to come so badly, you could have prevented all of this if you simply asked her.
I just heard this from Zuikaku earlier. Besides, when Nagato has made her mind to do something, there's nothing we can do to stop her.
However, Akagi... I must say, you look like you're quite enjoying this situation.
Who knows? Everything is more interesting after a few drinks.
Akagi...
In any case, if Nagato is here, then I suppose we won't need Shinano to perform the ritual?
In the first place, Yamashiro was just supposed to be the backup plan...
Ehhhhhhh?!
Yamashiro's tail went rigid with shock.
Y-Yamashiro won't be doing the ritual?!
You'll get to do the next best thing. Even if you don't get to perform the actual ritual, you can still recite blessings and whatnot.
Why don't we give it a try? Hibiki, bring Watatsumi over here.
Y-yes ma'am!
Hibiki dashed out of the building.
Hmm, so this is this the legendary artifact I've heard so much about? The one that can call a ship with no history into existence?
It'd be nice if it could help speed our Plan Z along~
Eugen, have you had a bit much to drink?
I haven't had enough, if anything~ Besides, I was just posing a hypothetical.
I'm sorry, everyone, please ignore what Eugen said.
Hehe, we're all friends here. If you need anything, just let us know, and I'm sure something can be arranged.
Oh my, are you sure about that? We wouldn't mind borrowing that "Watatsumi" of yours in that case. Ahaha~
(whispers) Someone seems to have led wolves into the room...
(whispers) What about Lady Nagato...?
(whispers) We haven't heard anything after Zuikaku's initial communication due to the interference of the Mirror Sea.
(whispers) We'll have to place our faith in her then. Above all, I don't know what Akagi is planning, but we can't let them have Watatsumi.
One divine object, coming through!
Upon hearing her words, the people gathered in the hall turned their eyes to Watatsumi, the atmosphere getting noticeably louder and more tense.
Eugen probably wouldn't be able to sail like this, so I'll take care of her for the time being.
And with that, the others in the hall began to move towards another ceremonial site.
Eugen, are you awake? It's time for us to make our move.
Eugen...?
Good grief...
Did you really get yourself drunk? I suppose we'll have to leave empty-handed...
What a terrifying bunch these Sakura Empire folks are...

Watatsumi.say: “They're wrapping around us! Hold them off at all costs!”
There was something odd about her recollections.
Their bodies were different. Their thoughts and their actions and their movements were different. They looked like humans, but they could not be further from the wisdom of humanity.
Takao, let's retreat! We've been totally routed!
Hold on a little longer! Reinforcements will arrive soon!
Even the strongest weapon, without the "guidance" and "wisdom" of mankind, would be nothing more than a tool of indiscriminate destruction.
Faced with the might of advanced weaponry as well as the violent forces of nature, the helpless girls could do nothing but retreat.
What's that over there?! Some kind of wall?!
Hold on!
Th-this is...
Is this... Watatsumi...?!
Accursed Sirens...!
Diadem of Light - Ceremonial Hall
Watatsumi, one of the sacred artifacts of the Sakura Empire, was brought out before one of the ceremonial halls.
On the surface, there was nothing about this stone's appearance that appeared "sacred." It was a simple stone, navy-blue in color.
Faintly it glowed, bathed in the light of the moon pouring through the window.
Then, the silence was broken...
Now then, this ceremony shall now commence upon Akagi's orders on behalf of Ryuuhou, who is unable to join us tonight.
This is just a rehearsal, Yamashiro! Come on, you're up!
W-woah... this is the sacred artifact said to harbor the power of a sea god? Hmm, looks rather ordinary though...
Um, everyone, please watch me conduct the ritual!
"Lift your voices in praise of Watatsumi. Show your courage, and admire its wisdom."
"Sing its praises so that it may guide us to the path of light."
"May our lands be forever blessed to stave away calamity."
ZAP!!
As Yamashiro reached out to touch Watatsumi, she was repelled, as if pushed away by an unseen force.
H-huh?
Cease this ceremony this instant! Step away from that stone!
Nagato and Zuikaku rushed into the hall.
Nagato! You're safe!
That stone is enchanted to repel everything except for those from the Sakura Empire! What are you?!
Following Nagato's lead, the other ships at the hall sprung to their feet.
Eh? Ehhhhhh?
As if reality itself was peeling away, a figure - neither Iron Blood nor Sakura Empire - stepped forward from behind Yamashiro.
I was pretty confident about my disguise too. How unfortunate that it was seen through so easily~
Siren!!
Did you sneak in like this? How cowardly!
Oh my, looks like my forces couldn't finish the job out there?
What a pity... if that "Ember" girl hadn't gotten in my way, none of you would even be here right now.
What do you plan to do with Watatsumi?!
Hehehe, who knows...
Lady Nagato, watch out...!
Before Observer had a chance to move, the roof of the ceremonial hall was ripped open by an explosion.
Under the force of the blast, the wood and concrete of the ceiling sheared away, leaving the hall half-open.
Fortunately, nobody was injured by falling debris.
I knew you'd come, "Ember." Hehehe... See, I knew there was a lot for us to talk about.
As quickly as she entered, Observer seemed to melt into the environment and disappear.
Showing up and disappearing like ghosts... are there any other Sirens?
Despite the sense of panic, everyone at the scene scanned their surroundings, preparing for further threats.
I'm sorry, Mikasa. I let an enemy slip through the line...
Sorry... I didn't do my job...
Don't worry about it. Keep maintaining your guard around the island. Even if the elite Sirens are able to slip through, at least the mass-produced models won't be able to get through.
(That "Ember" person that she mentioned... was she the one who attacked us...?)
Um, excuse me! What should Hibiki do...?
Stay here and protect Nagato and Watatsumi. Shoukaku and I will go intercept the attacking enemies!
Leave it to me!

Ember's Assault.say: That "Ember" person was the one who destroyed our ceremonial hall?
...that katana looked just like the ones we make in the Sakura Empire! Show yourself!
The mysterious ship turned around to face the sisters from the Fifth Carrier Division.
A pawn with the same face as Takao...?
No, you're not a pawn... You pushed Observer back with your attack earlier.
She's equipped with Kansen rigging... Who are you, and what are you after? Why would you attack us?
We'll have to do this the hard way!
Who I am is irrelevant. I have two objectives.
First, I will not let Observer have the stone. Second...
(She even has the same voice as Takao...?)

Showdown.say: Guh...!
Across the Mirror Seas, black and white shadows danced in a roar of steel and flame.
...Without the use of my aircraft, all I can do is fight her hand-to-hand...! And even with Shoukaku's support, it's taking everything I have just to parry her blows...!
This person is monstrously strong...!!
I have no intention of clashing with you. However...
If you would hinder my objectives - the destruction of Watatsumi, then...
You shall taste my swordsmanship!
Zuikaku!
Shoukaku!!
Remember this well: If you rely exceedingly on your rigging, then you shall become incompetent.
Zuikaku, it's fine... only our equipment and our clothes have sustained any damage...
You're Takao, aren't you? Why are you trying to destroy one of the Sakura Empire's relics? What happened to you?
Upon hearing that name, "Ember" stopped moving and spun around.
...My name... No, that codename... I haven't heard it for a long time.
...But speaking of that name, "Takao"...
It is just a seal of wishful thinking that the humans imposed upon us.
If those people were to disappear...
Then that name...
Becomes meaningless!!
Gaah...! Sh-she's even stronger than... the Grey Ghost!
...Reinforcements?
Don't you dare lay a finger on our friends!
Everyone, be careful! She's not like anything we've faced before!
Yes, that's why we must fight! Let me handle the aerial support!
You won't win with an attitude like that, Zuikaku!
Kasumi... and Foo as well... will do our best!
Hah... it won't be a fair fight with all of you here, but...
...the most important thing right now is protecting Watatsumi!

Cut Time.say: Not bad...! But I don't have any more time to waste here...
Under the withering firepower of all the Sakura Empire ships, "Takao" was unable to approach the island.
Zuikaku rushed to block off "Takao," who had suddenly broken away from the fight to rush straight towards Watatsumi.
The instant their eyes met, it was as if time had stopped flowing...
...Zuikaku felt herself falling, and "Takao" blurred past her, charging forward at full speed.
I, I'm fine, but... what just happened...?!
(I didn't feel any sort of pressure from her, but when I reached out to strike...)
(No, it was the moment I saw her eyes... my body wouldn't move...)

Flash of Shadow.say: Diadem of Light - Ceremonial Hall
Woah... this place is a dump... It's going to be hard to get Watatsumi out...
Indeed. Worst case scenario, we will have to conduct the ceremony right here anyway...
Lady Nagato, please hold on for a moment! I'll go dig up the ritual objects! Heave, ho...!
You're quite hardy for a destroyer...
Ehehe~ Ryuuhou often puts me through worse, so this is nothing for me!
Mikasa, are you worried about something?
Yes, it's about this ritual, but I can't quite place my finger on it...
There's... something off about all of this.
It must be serious if it's even bothering the Great Veteran~
I didn't really have anything special in mind. After all, the ceremony to tap into Watatsumi's power has always been more of a celebration, hasn't it?
Mmhm, I am in agreement. What a travesty it would be to become dependent upon the gods. We must create the future we want with our own hands.
Hehe, I knew that if anyone would understand, it'd be you, Great Veteran Mikasa.
Allow me to come clean about this ceremony. Though I have taken the initiative in using Siren technology, everything I do is for the sake of the Sakura Empire's future.
Using the power of the gods... No, growing addicted and reliant upon the gods' blessings... the Sakura Empire has no future if we continue to follow the old ways.
What I desire is a world free from that... and I'm sure "that person" sees things the same way.
But know this, Akagi. If the Sirens' technology was truly capable of bringing about the future you seek, I would have sided with you.
From what I have seen, you are not the one using the Sirens. They are the ones using you.
...The Sirens' power is intoxicating. It is easy to control, but it is just as easy to lose yourself to it.
The path you walk is now distorted. I fear that if you continue down this path, you will soon turn your blade against your own people.
And I am sure that you would not want "that person" to see you like that.
Pardon me for saying this, Mikasa, but...
What exactly is this "righteous path" that is spoken of so highly in the Sakura Empire?
Would you condemn yourself to a future within the Azur Lane, content to merely break even with the Sirens, settling with a false peace, and pretending to be friends?
While people are still willing to fight, we must press forward. Otherwise, we will be shackled and enslaved one day.
Mikasa, are you saying that all the sacrifices that we've had to make so far were unavoidable?
Wooooaaaahhhh!
Hibiki, who was in the process of preparing for the ceremony's continuation, made her grand entrance... on the verge of tumbling over.
Sorry about that! Lost my balance again for a moment!
Oh, Lady Nagato, I've finished the preparations for the rehearsal ceremony!
Nagato - the head miko of the Sakura Empire - and Kawakaze, followed Hibiki to the center of the ceremony hall.
All of you have acted with the Sakura Empire's best interests in mind, and I know this fact better than anyone else. That is why, at least during this ceremony, let us make peace with one another.
Not just for my sake, but also for each other. That is the way to please the gods.
Nagato faced Watatsumi and offered a prayer for the Sakura Empire.
"Lift your voices in praise of Watatsumi. Show your courage, and admire its wisdom."
"Sing its praises so that it may guide us to the path of light."
"May our lands be forever blessed to stave away calamity."
...But nothing seemed to happen.
As I thought... My words alone are not enough to reach the gods.
Mikasa! The enemy known as "Ember" managed to escape from us... and she's headed towards --
What?!
"Ember" suddenly appeared at the entrance to the ceremony hall, and everyone turned to face her in shock...
...everyone, except for Akagi and Kaga.
You're... Takao?!
Lady Nagato, stand down. I do not wish to point my blade at my people.
Nagato fearlessly placed herself between "Ember" and Watatsumi, signaling her intent to protect it.
Unless you state your reason for seeking Watatsumi's destruction, I cannot yield to you.
...The thing known as "Watatsumi" is not a sacred artifact, but a manifestation of calamity.
By feeding upon the negative emotions throughout the land, it eventually ushers forth untold destruction.
This ritual long predates my existence. I cannot simply take your word at face value.
That history is false. This stone does not exist in your world.
...Come forth!
A blade extended towards Nagato at an inhuman speed.
Lady Nagato!
Kawakaze drew her sword, her reflexes surging as she tried to intercept the attack.
A silence soon fell across the room. Mikasa and Hibiki, who both began to run forward, came to a stop.
As if lightning had struck, the deed was done before anyone in the hall could react.
Lady Nagato... is unharmed...?
I am fine.
Watatsumi, still hidden behind Nagato's back, was cleanly split in half.
No... Watatsumi...!
...This is a fake. Did you hide the real one away beforehand?
A regular stone coated luminescent paint, tinkered with some Siren technology, and imbued with a Sakura Empire defensive charm...
Hmph... Looks like I've wasted my time here.

Ending.say: A few days later
So in the end, their ritual still failed?
Seems like it was impossible after all.
Nobody expected that the "Watatsumi" used in that ritual was a fake. Now the entire Sakura Empire is in turmoil because of it.
Thanks to a certain Prinz Inebriated, I didn't get the full details.
We'll be heading home empty-handed now, mission failed and all that. She's probably going to yell at us too.
Thiele, I wasn't drunk. I was merely acting.
You could have challenged Lebe to a hibernation contest with how far gone you were. Impressive acting.
...Don't tell anyone about this...
I know, I know. It's just between the two of us.
Z2 and Eugen, who both knew they were going to be in deep trouble, purchased a copious amount of Sakura Empire sake on their way back.

But you know, I wouldn't call this "leaving empty-handed." After all, we learned some valuable information about the "Reborn Combined Fleet," the internal structure of the Sakura Empire, and even found out about their newest ship.
With this amount of information, who cares about some backwater ritual? On top of that, I also dropped some hints about "that plan" of ours.
I'm sure there is someone who would be willing to negotiate with us in that regard...
Prinz Eugen, at least give me some time to think this over...
My my, if it isn't Akagi from the Sakura Empire? If you're here to send us off, we don't need *that* much hospitality.
Some things are best discussed away from prying eyes.
I'll be straightforward. I want more information regarding the Iron Blood's ships, as well as everything you know about the Sirens.
You're asking for quite a lot there... Even if the Iron Blood and the Sakura Empire are allies, I can't just give you all that information so readily.
But, I wonder... what kind of price is the Sakura Empire willing to pay for this information?
Well, let's talk about that request you made at the banquet.
...Watatsumi. You said you wanted to see what you could do with it, right?

Ceremony's Dusk.say: Diadem of Light - A few days later
After the conclusion of the ceremony, a special gathering was held for those who fought bravely against the Sirens.
Mikasa also forced(?) Nagato to attend.
Lady Mikasa! Thank you for taking the time to make the journey all the way out here!
Indeed. I also squared off against that "Ember" character! Ahaha!
However, now that we know that there are stronger enemies out there than the Sirens, we will have to train harder than ever before.
That "Takao"... had such terrifying strength, even without the use of rigging...
Yeah... Shoukaku and I together couldn't even hold her back. I would not want to fight her alone.
We have Grey Ghosts, Blue Ghosts, and now this... Crazy strong folks just keep popping up one after another! Ahahaha!
Zuikaku, I've finished cooking~ Everyone, let's all go eat~
The venue was livelier than ever as the delicious aroma of tempura and traditional pastries mingled with the sounds of merriment.
I'm sorry, Shoukaku! My skills... they're still lacking...
Zuikaku apologized, thinking back to when she was almost cut by "Ember."
It's not your fault, Zuikaku. None of us could have stood against someone that strong. Rather, I'm just thankful that you're alive.
Besides, I like being able to nurse you back to health~
Shoukaku...
Hehe, as your big sister, seeing you try your hardest fills my heart with pride~
That's why, for your sake, I'll continue to live on as well, Zuikaku~♪
Shoukaku, don't plant your own death flag!
Meanwhile, two figures were sitting on the other side of the venue.
Lady Nagato, there are no words that can express my remorse.
Not only did I expose you to danger, but I also could not protect you at a crucial moment...
I have lost my qualifications to serve as your escort, Lady Nagato...!
Kawakaze bowed her head until she could only see the ground.
You have not.
If you do not have the qualifications to be an escort, then the Royal Knights, as well as Iris's Chevaliers, would have to disband.
Lady Nagato...
In other words, there is nobody I would rather have as an escort than you!
Therefore, please continue your efforts as my escort!
...Yes, Lady Nagato!
Though such words may not be particularly encouraging or comforting to some, to Kawakaze, those few words were the greatest compliment she could receive.
I will do my best to meet your expectations, Lady Nagato!
...Good, now stand straight.
I suppose this concludes another chapter of our lives.
Guess so. Hard to believe so much happened in such a short period of time...
Hmm, I wonder if fighting the Sirens back in ancient times was also like this.
...Sorry, I'm just getting sentimental.
But, without Watatsumi, it won't be possible for us to hold the Dawning Ceremony...
I just don't get it. Who did this, and when? Why would they take something so important to us?
According to Nagato, that stone can only be touched by someone from the Sakura Empire. If that's the case, then everyone at the ceremonial hall that day is a suspect.
Mm, if you ask me, I'd say that it was Akagi or Kaga who did it.
......But, you know, that would be hard to prove.
Akagi, and Kaga...?!
That's right. Of course, I have no hard proof, but they've been acting strangely ever since the formation of the Reborn Combined Fleet. Would you happen to know anything about it, Ryuuhou?
Now that I think about it, Akagi and Kaga were the first ones to leave the island when they went to send off the Iron Blood guests. But after that...
Hibiki... Well, I just can't see a girl like her doing something like that.
Ah, um...
Kasumi, what's the matter?
Just now... um...
Lady Shinano seems to have woken up?
Great, I managed to make it to the end without drawing too much attention to myself!
By the way, why did you choose Shinano to host the ceremony? Was it because of her overwhelming power? Even so, there was no way she was going to be ready in time.
Nagato then rushed over anyway after hearing that. Could it be that someone knew that all of this would happen from the very beginning?
Well, in the end, these rituals are out of my area of expertise! Let's just take it easy and not dive too deeply into these things~ Phew...

sequence: ……正直、実感が少し湧かないんだ
「聖域」を求めて鏡面海域に迷い込んで、翔鶴姉と危ない目に遭って
そして三笠大先輩と出会って、長門様を目覚めさせて、
なのにまた、赤城先輩と加賀先輩のいる、この海に踏み込んだなんて
赤城先輩たちは一体、何を狙っているの？
私も、翔鶴姉も、大先輩や長門様でも…ましてや重桜の皆ですらも、それはわからない気がする

響く青玉の音.say: 重桜・祭儀（さいぎ）の島
カランカラン！
龍鳳さんどいて――！
機材を運んでいる特型駆逐艦「響」はバランスを崩して今にも転びそうだ。
カラン！ドン！カン！
――狼狽しながらも尻もちをついた響は、式典に使われる機材を散らかしてしまった。
あいたた……
龍鳳さんひどいよぉ…響を助けてくれないなんて＞＜
名前を呼ばれたのは、潜水空母「大鯨」から改造され、軽空母になった「龍鳳」であり、彼女は機材を優雅に拾い上げた。
艦船はそれぐらいでは怪我しないでしょうに。というか機材は大事に運びなさいって言いましたね？
もーう、龍鳳さん！
祭儀まであとちょっとですから、もっと気を付けたほうがいいですよ
……そういえば、あの子たちは本当に来るのですか？
重桜所属なら来ないはずがありませんよ
「歴史ある重桜の祭儀を執り行い、カミに奉り我が行き先を示して頂けば、セイレーンと諸外勢力に脅かされ翳りし重桜の未来もきっと光明に満ち溢れよう――」と
龍鳳さん、ここにいましたか
能代さん？お疲れ様、何か用ですか？
鉄血の来訪者からの連絡を受信しました。祭儀には参加する――とのことですが、どうやら迷子になっているようです
では……今回は初めてよその陣営から参加者が来るのですね
能代さん、そっちの案内をお願いできませんか？
………はい、すぐにかかります
ですが龍鳳さんには、重桜艦隊の威光発揚のため、祭儀に参加する艦船たちが戦果を競う奉納行事、「連合艦隊演習」－－
行事の参加者と対戦組み合わせ、その手配をお願いします
いわゆるお祭り騒ぎ的なもの…ではないので気を引き締めなければなりませんね
トントン
龍鳳、赤城さんたちがそろそろ祭儀の島周辺に到着するぞ
一航戦、やっぱり来たんだね～
龍鳳さん、まずはあなたの案内からですね
……はい、もちろんです
重桜における大事な祭儀、いまは私…ううん、私達の手に委ねられている
…重桜のために、絶対失敗させませんっ！
ではみんな、それぞれの持ち場に戻りましょう！
……はい！
積年の恨み…ではなく、訓練の成果を皆にお見せします！
会場を一望して、龍鳳たちがそれぞれの持ち場に移動を開始した。

sequence: 重桜の海は、祭儀の熱狂に包まれようとしていた

動く絡繰の糸.say: 重桜・祭儀の島
数々の島で構成される、独自の文化圏を持つ一大勢力「重桜」
その本島から離れ、周りの6つの離島をかけ橋で繋ぎ、光を放つ太陽か、はたまた氷晶のような形の「祭儀の島」
ミズホの大地とは海の隔たりこそあるものの、数多くの祭事儀典が行われてきたこの島は、いわゆるスピリチュアルスポットというべき存在だ
祭儀の島か…これはいい場所を選ばれたな
ええ、ここも人々の思いや信仰が集まる、一つの「聖域」よ
上層部の連中、「決戦計画」と抜かす割につくづく無駄なことをするわね…
赤城は「決戦計画」のことを信用してないのですか？
人的資源――力や、想いの言霊を浪費し、「触媒」を使ってまで作られた艦船がただ寝ているだけですもの
でも信濃さん、寝ているだけでも何が起きたかわかったり、祭儀の指示を出したりできるって噂ですよ？本当かどうかは…
そんな噂を信じる子はよほど世間知らずなのかしら
「翳りし重桜の未来もきっと光明に満ち溢れよう――」都合のいい戯言だ
山城はどう思います？ここは専門であるあなたの意見も聞きたいわね
は、はい！ええとね、まずは祭儀の由縁を説明するとですね――
この祭儀の島に祀られている重桜の宝器（ほうき）－－【ワタツミ】の封印が開封されまして…
で、祭儀で集まった信仰の力と宝器を触媒にしてー、海のカミサマに祈りを捧げるとー、カンレキ的にない艦船も現れるとかないとか
と、駿河さんは実はカミサマによって作られたお使いでした！ってオチですね…
あと、祭儀は元々重桜の神子が取り仕切り、「祭り」と「儀式」を組み合わせた一つの行事となっています
普通に考えると、長門様が出るわけですが、ええと……
絶対本来の想定通りにはならないです！はい！
長門様は今……いや、なんでもない。やっぱりカミの言葉など望むべくもないか
あの子はここには現れませんわ。瑞鶴と翔鶴、そして三笠様とともに行動している以上。
そもそも、【ワタツミ】があって、祝詞さえ暗唱できれば誰でもやれるでしょうに。
加賀、まさかこんな噂話を信じたわけじゃないでしょうね？
信じるわけがない。…だが投資したからには回収を望まずとも、少しは報われたいだけだ
ええ。不確かな予言にすがりつき、思いの言霊と宝器を浪費するよりは…………
すみません赤城さん、い、今の話、山城にはよくわかりませんけど危なそうな話ですね？もし誰かに聞かれたら……
ふふふ、ただの冗談ですわよ

案内役①.say: 祭儀の島へようこそ。案内役の龍鳳と申します
出迎えは龍鳳かしら。お久しぶりね
宜しくおねがいします。赤城さん、加賀さん
祭儀のルールは分かっている。「祭儀に参加する艦船には、奉納として己の力を示すべし」だな
加賀、軽空母だと侮らないことよ？祭儀の主催、その一翼を担える者だとしたら、実力があるのは確実よ
はい。全ては我が重桜の未来のために……！

押し寄せる波.say: さすがは初代一航戦の先輩方…負けました
改めまして、遠路はるばる祭儀の島にお越しいただき、誠にありがとうございます
ええ、手を抜く余裕すらなかったわ
それにしても龍鳳、大した成長ね。今の貴女なら、重桜の空母機動部隊の一翼を担っても申し分ないわ
お褒めに預かりありがとうございます。ですが恥ずかしながら、私にはまだまだ勉強することが多く、いきなりそんな大任を任されましても……
いいえ、これは素直な評価よ
世界は弱肉強食、お前のような力ある者のみが大義を唱えられる――加賀風に言えばそうなのかしら
と、冗談はさておき、此度の祭儀の準備、ご苦労だったわ
引き続き重桜の未来のために、ともに頑張りましょ？
ははっ。では空母機動部隊の一翼を担う存在になることを目標に努力させていただきます！
ところで、赤城さんは私たち重桜を率いる存在です。こういう演習に顔を出す必要などないと思っていましたが…
いいえ、こういう行事こそ協力させてもらうわよ
祭儀といい、セイレーン技術といい、例の上層部の「決戦計画」といい、使える手はなんでも使うのが重桜のやり方よ
（天城姉さまでも、こうするに違いないわ）
ふふふ、なんだか昔の自分を見ている気がするわ
いいえ、なんでもないわ。目標をしっかり持って頑張るのよ、龍鳳

もう一つの戦場.say: 祭儀の島・周辺海域
ここが祭儀の島……重桜本島とも長門様の居所ともだいぶ雰囲気が違うね……
そもそもこの祭儀、重桜の神子である長門様が執り行うべきだよね…まさか長門様を「都合により」ってハブっちゃうなんて
一航戦の先輩たち、上層部に随分根回ししたのね
鏡面海域の一件があるから、私たちを排除しようとしているかも…赤城先輩たち、本当にセイレーンと……
瑞鶴、そう判断するのは早計だぞ。こうして祭儀の島に何事もなくたどり着いただろう？
まあいくら赤城先輩でも、三笠大先輩のこととなると無視するわけにはいかないからね。私もいつか「大先輩」って呼ばれたいな～
あと何十年かすればいつかはなれるんじゃない？――瑞鶴大・先・輩♪
翔鶴姉その呼び方やめて！恥ずかしすぎるから！
あははは、朝っぱらから元気があっていいことだ。……ここは一つ真面目な話でもするか
翔鶴、瑞鶴、祭儀の島に到着するまでにもう一度確認するぞ
確かにあの鏡面海域での赤城の行動は不可解で、重桜の仲間たちを傷つけようとしているとも捉えられる
だが赤城は今の重桜を率いる存在のひとりだ。重桜の仲間たちのためにも、真正面から赤城相手に事を荒立てるのは得策ではない
我の推測に間違いなければ、重桜内で「聖域」での赤城の行動を知っているのはごくわずかに過ぎないだろう
そもそも、あの海域がセイレーンの鏡面海域となると、あの海域でお主たちが出会った暁と山城も本物であるかどうか疑わしい
……翔鶴と赤城、加賀は本物だがな
ともかく、今回の祭儀の参加はあくまで赤城の行動の真意、そして重桜の仲間たちの認識を確認するためだぞ
つまり、味方を増やすためね！わかってますって！
そうだ。いざという時に、我らの今の行動は仲間たちが味方になってくれるという結果につながる。社交場も戦場、というのはまさしくこの意味だ
思えば北方連合やロイヤルとはこういう機会が多いが、鉄血も参加するとなるとやっぱり一筋縄にはいかないな……
ええ、臨機応変が肝心ですね
そろそろ主催側がおでましの頃ですし、気を引き締めてまいりましょう

案内人②.say: 祭儀主催担当の駿河です。長旅お疲れ様でございます。三笠様、そして翔鶴さんに瑞鶴さん
お主は噂の紀伊型三番艦駿河か。うむ、百聞は一見に如かず――祭儀の準備、誠に大儀である。重桜の仲間に代わって感謝するぞ
ありがとうございます。自分は並み居る重桜の艦船の一人としてやるべきことをしたまでで、別に褒められるようなことは…
ははは。謙遜も過ぎると卑屈になるぞ。聞いた話によれば合同演習の準備事務だけでなく、自ら参加も申し出たそうではないか
は、はぁい……そういうことになっていますね
演習とはいえ、他陣営の参加者もいる以上重桜の威光を示さねばならぬ。お主の力を試す故、我らと一回手合わせするのはどうかな？
（え！いきなり！？こういうタイプはちょっと苦手だけど…！）
あ！今「え！いきなり！？」って心の中で叫んだな！
「なんでわかった！？」って心で言ってそうだな。心が読みやす過ぎるのは感心しないな、まったく、最近の若者は…
…っ！こんな質問をして恐縮ですが、どうして…わかったのですか？
場数ってやつかな。戦場で敵の心を読もうと努力し続ければいずれ、コツがつかめるようになる
座学での成績が抜群だと聞いておる。どれ、この我が実戦というものを教えてやろう！
三笠様が直々にご教示くださるのでしたら、こっちも全力を出させていただきます…！
その心意気だ。さあ、かかってくるがよい！
（三笠様相手に手を抜いてしまうとバレるに決まっている。本当の本当に、全力を出す…！）

駿河の戦法.say: ええ、三笠様の旧式艤装では対空火力が貧弱だとお聞きしております
なので、量産型の空母を後方に配置し、航空攻撃を仕掛けさせました。勝負を決めさせていただきます…！
なるほど、戦艦である自分を囮にして空母を守り、航空攻撃でかく乱しつつ相手を追い詰める……合理的な戦法だ
だが――我が戦法までもが旧式だったと思うのは、とんだ勘違いであるぞ！

共同作戦.say: で、ですよね――！
「我ら」と言っていましたし瑞鶴さんと翔鶴さんのサポートももちろんありますね…はあ、さすがに大先輩には勝てませんね……こっちの負けです
まあ、我も何回も危ないところに追い詰められたがな
その割にあっという間に状況を逆転させたじゃないですか…さ、さすが大先輩です……
（大先輩の兵装は把握済みで、こっちの攻撃位置と相対距離もほぼ完璧に保っていた…航空攻撃抜きにしても負けないはず）
（どこで問題が起きたか全く見当つかないわね……おっそろしいわこの人！）
今「この人恐ろしい」と考えておるな？
あ、いいえ！そんなつもりは…！
良い。我を侮ったとは言ったが、どうやらそうではなかったようだ
航空攻撃を駆使しても、お主は自分の艤装を過信せず、突撃するのではなく、あくまで真っ当な戦術で我に挑んだ
……あはは、にしても時代の変化とは素晴らしいものだな。より強い機関に主砲、そして航空機ときたら
我はもう時代遅れ、と認めざるを得ないな
（すんなり自分が時代遅れだと言えるなんて、流石ね…）
我のことを嘆くでないぞ。戦に挑む者として、現実を直視しないでどうする
願わくば我のような時代遅れが出ないことだが、世の中はそううまくいかないものだ
一線から引いても、重桜が力を求めているとなれば、艦船である我も座視するわけにはいかない。重桜の艦船として己の責務を果たすまでだ
それが過去の仲間たちに託された、時の流れに押し流されようが果たさなければならぬ我の使命である
三笠は拳を胸の前で握りしめた。
重桜以外の他陣営が参加するとのことだ。島の防衛態勢が万全か心配する年寄りのわがままだと思ってほしい
ええ、お気遣いありがとうございます。こちらこそご心配をおかけして申し訳ありません
あははは、すまなかった。瑞鶴、翔鶴、そろそろ島に進むとしよう
（かといっても、力だけを求めては己の道を歪めてしまう）
（赤城、お主は一体何を考えているのか…）

スペアプラン.say: 祭儀の島・近海
ティーレ、まだ？もうお昼の時間よ？
今頑張って記録して…ええ、そろそろ終わりますのでもう少し待ってください
海域丸ごとを一つの閉鎖空間とし、外からの観測を阻む技術――デタラメですね。セイレーン技術を応用した「結界」
デタラメ？私たちの研究がまだその分野に足を踏み入れていないだけよ
それより、弾薬の準備は？
ええ、十分です
艤装のコンディションは？
問題ありません。はい
いい子ね。で、脱出ルートはどうかしら？
確保済みですが。ここで確認する必要はないでしょう
ふふん、念のため。ね
赤城の計画はうまくいかないと思うのですか？
私じゃなくて本国にいる「彼女」が心配してたわ
おかげさまで、計画書まで作るハメになったけど
ええ…それにしてもすごくずさんな計画ですね。重桜の赤城
そうよ？セイレーンは簡単に操れるものじゃないわ
この祭儀を利用して人を集めておきましたから、そのまま戦力として投入できればいいですが。さもなくば…
お気の毒だけど、重桜を従えるには必要なことよ。別に私がやりたいわけじゃないわ
ええ、わかっています。最低ですが
本国の決めた方針よ。疑う気？
いいえ、そんなつもりじゃ…
最後の座標の走査と記録も完了しました。オイゲンさん
そうね。さて、迷子のふりをするのはいい加減やめようかしら――あまり待たせても悪いしね～

案内人③.say: 祭儀の島へようこそ、鉄血来訪団の皆様
阿賀野型軽巡能代、祭儀の主催委員として皆様をお待ちしておりました
レッドアクシズの盟友として、お誘いいただき誠に光栄でございます
鉄血にいる仲間たちに代わって、重桜の皆様ならびに信濃様に感謝の意を述べたく存じます
もちろんです。では、これより宿泊先にご案内させていただき……
「祭儀に参加する艦船には、奉納として己の力を示すべし」――いわゆる前座として対抗演習があるって聞きましたけど？
ええ、確かに奉納として、演習弾を使った海戦演習が行われていますが
それはあくまで重桜のメンバーが参加するもので、鉄血の皆様にはそのようなことを強要いたしません
ふーん、郷に入っては郷に従えってのがあるじゃない？私たちは重桜のこういう行事を体験したいんですけど？
個人的な頼みでもあるわ。まさかこの祭儀の主催者側が客人の興を削ぐようなことをするとでもいうの？
……主催側として客人をもてなすのは当然です。そこまで仰るのでしたら、お望みどおりにいたしましょう
軽巡能代、恐れ入りますが鉄血の皆様のお相手をさせていただきます
ふふ、本当はそっちも、最初からこれを狙っていたんじゃなくて？…重桜の最新鋭艦、その力を見せて頂戴
鉄血所属、重巡プリンツオイゲン

煽動者.say: なによ、最新鋭艦なのにこの程度？
恐れ入ったけどどうやら冗談じゃなさそうね
（あの演習弾の威力とこっちに向けてくる露骨な殺意…プリンツ・オイゲン、本気で戦っていた…なら……）
（……ううん、相手は客人よ。ムキになってはいけないわ）
素晴らしい戦い方です。さすが歴戦の武勲艦、能代感服いたしました。
戦い方？違うわ。これが実力差よ
貴女程度の相手なら戦い方を考えるまでもないわ
そうですか。ただの演習にもかかわらず全開でお付き合いいただき誠にありがとうございます
あーあ、鉄血の盟友と聞いてあきれるわ。まさか重桜の最新鋭軽巡がこの程度じゃ重桜の力なんてたかが知れてるわね
もうがっかり。ディーレ、本土に戻る準備を
侮らないでプリンツ・オイゲン
重桜の最新鋭艦の力をそんなに見たいのでしたら、今からじっくりお見せします
私のことはともかく、重桜を侮辱したこと、後悔させてやります！
あら、ようやく本気出す気になった？いいわね。その表情よ！
楽しく戦り合おうかしら！！

権謀術数.say: 隙あり…！
ここまでよ、能代、下がりなさい！
赤城さん！？……かしこまりました
まったくセイレーンが攻めてきたかと…何のマネかしら？鉄血のプリンツ・オイゲン
危なかったわよ？重桜の伝統行事と聞いて観光客としておとなしく見学しようとしたけど
貴女がもう少し遅れていたら、私はこの子に切り捨てられていたところだわ
それが本当でしたら、うちの能代がかのプリンツ・オイゲンに正面切って戦えて、しかも追い詰めただなんて、まさに光栄至極ですわ
……貴女、能代を沈めるつもりで戦おうとしましたわね
私はただ普通にイベントを楽しんだだけよ？まあ煽ったのはこっちだけど
赤城さん、私あと少しで………
少しなんかじゃありません。あの時向こうが一斉射でもしたら即修理ドック入りよ。
プリンツ・オイゲンのあれは隙ではなく、あなたを射線に誘導するための行動でしたわ
くっ…すみません赤城さん、少し冷静さを失いました
オイゲンさんに煽られてそのまま乗ったほうも悪いですが、致し方ありませんね
ヒッパーさんなら最初の発言で爆発していました。ええ、それに比べて能代さんはよく我慢した方だと言えましょう
ふふ、ごめんなさいね。真面目そうな子だからついからかいたくなっちゃって
謝罪の品として鉄血のお土産でも――と言いたいところだけど、どうする？
いいえ、挑発に乗った私のほうに非があります。申し訳ございませんでした
……にしても、鉄血の到着が予定時間より随分と遅くなりましたわね。どこで迷子になりましたの？
さあ？重桜の海は私達にとって秘境のようなもの。たどり着くだけでも骨が折れたわ
（こっちは約束通り結界の入り口で待っていましたが。となると、もしや……）
あら、口が上手なこと…
お互い同盟相手、そこまで隠す必要なんてないと思いますわ？【どうやって】迷子になりましたか、ご教示いただけません？
ふふ、赤城がそこまで言うのなら、隠し通せそうにないわね
お腹減って死にそうだわ～
オイゲンさんの言う通りです。こき使われて空腹で倒れる寸前です。はい
客人の方にお腹を空かせたままでは重桜の立つ瀬がありません。能代、島まで案内していただけないかしら？
ええ、祭儀の見どころはまだこれからですわ……

sequence: 「己を貫く」――と大先輩が言っていた
私が信じていた、重桜と仲間たちを率いている、あの赤城先輩と加賀先輩が
まさか、セイレーンと結託しているだなんて……
あと「聖域」の件のあとも、頑張って調べていた
幸い、大先輩と長門様、陸奥様と江風が信用してくれた
あの海域で出会った暁と山城はどうやら無事だけど
みんな、あのときの出来事が記憶にないようで……
この祭儀で、何もわからないかもしれない
――きっとなにかが、分かる気がする――

暗躍する影.say: 数日前、とある海域にて
この時代に存在し得ない施設の残骸と、いたる所に残っている斬撃の痕跡が、この場所と、この場所を襲撃した存在の正体を示している。
ここはセイレーンによって創造された「鏡面海域」――正確に言えば、「鏡面海域」だった場所だ。
…うまく片付いた。拙者は次の場所に移動させてもらう
あら、久しぶりの客人ね。珍しいじゃない
無視とは失礼ね
……そなたらと交わす言葉など持ち合わせておらぬ
そう言わないでちょうだい。こっちはあなたと語り合いたくてしょうがないわ
あのコードGはともかく、「余燼（よじん）」…たしかそう名乗っていたわね？あなたたち全員こんな性格なの？
挨拶も断りもなく、いきなり人んちを荒らし回って……立て直すこっちの苦労も考えてほしいわ
あなたたちが姿を現してから、こっちの端末の消耗と作業プロセスのリソース使用率が3倍ちょっと増えたけど？
でもまさかとは思うけど、あなたはあのコードGによって私たちをかく乱するためだけに召喚されたのではなくて？
……彼女の計画を探るためにわざわざ姿を見せたのか。そなたとは関係ない。消えろ
「関係ない」…ねえ？ここを廃墟にしておいて、その発言はないんじゃない？
でも大丈夫よ。どうせもう使わない場所だから、気が済むまでもっと破壊してくれて構わないわ
コードGの座標なら把握しているわ
そして、あなたが彼女の代わりに「鏡面海域」を荒らし回っていることも
しかし、なぜ彼女は急に鳴りを潜めちゃったの？この世界の艦船たちを指揮する存在と出会ったのは、そんなに衝撃的？
……言いたいのはそれだけか
さあ？でもこの海域での通信装置はこれで最後なの。あなたに切られる前に肝心なことも伝えられなかったら損だわ
だからあと一つだけ、大事なことを伝えようかしら
重桜のあの「祭儀」、そろそろ開催されるわよ
